 We're a small, product-obsessed founding team in Stockholm, already working with several architecture firms
 



 across Stockholm. And we're just getting started.
 



  




**Role Description**

  





 At Arkyv, we're turning frontier AI into tools that architects rely on for their everyday work, and we're looking for a founding engineer to help us do it.
 



  





 You'll work at the intersection of agent architecture and full-stack product development, with deep ownership from day one and a small team around you that expects you to ship. This is a full-time, on-site role based in Stockholm. We believe building together in person drives better outcomes.
 



  




**Responsibilities**

  





 - Architect multi-step agents that plan, reason, and act reliably inside real design tools
 



 - Ship features across the full stack that put AI into real architectural workflows
 



 - Take ownership of the codebase, balancing quality, security, and speed of development
 



 - Balance latency, quality, and cost in production AI systems
 



 - Establish evaluation, metrics, and measurable quality improvements across our AI surface
 



  




**Required Qualifications**

  





 - A strong software engineer with solid TypeScript experience
 



 - Demonstrated experience building agent systems
 



 - AI coding tools are a core part of your daily workflow
 



 - A track record of shipping production software
 



 - Comfort with ambiguity and early-stage pace
 



  




**Preferred Qualifications**

  





 - Have built with agent SDKs like the Vercel AI SDK or Claude Agent SDK
 



 - Hands-on experience with image generation models and pipelines
 



 - Cloud experience with AWS and/or Azure
 



 - C# experience
 



  




**Perks**

  





 - Competitive Salary & Company stock options
 



 - 25 days/year of paid vacation
 



 - Pension
 



 - 5,000 SEK wellness allowance
 



 - Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, parties, climbing/bouldering)
 



 - An opportunity to shape something that will have a great impact
 



  




**How to Apply**

  





 If this sounds like your kind of role, email apply@arkyv.ai with
 



 - your LinkedIn or CV
 



 - a project you're proud of
 



 - a few sentences about yourself and why you're applying
 



 - description of how you currently utilize AI to develop

title: Sound Design Intern
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 Battlefield is a storied franchise renowned for uncompromising combat gameplay and all-out warfare, for over two decades. 100 million players and 5 billion hours played later, Battlefield Studios is defining the future of the first-person shooter with the biggest launch in franchise history with Battlefield 6, and a new era beginning with Battlefield REDSEC.
   

  

 United under the banner of Battlefield Studios, 4 world-class teams across Criterion, DICE, Motive, and Ripple Effect have come together to focus on the future of the franchise, a connected Battlefield universe filled with immersive experiences built on our unique DNA.
   

  

 LET’S PUSH THINGS FORWARD
   

  

 DICE is a creative studio with offices in Stockholm and Gothenburg. We believe in the power of inclusion and welcome game creators from all backgrounds to collaborate with us as we unlock the potential for the future of Battlefield!
   

  

 We’re always pushing to be at the forefront of creative entertainment - blending digital art, design, and technology to push boundaries. Our collaborative culture is fueled by passion, driving innovation and making a positive difference for our players and community.
   

  

 At DICE, your ideas matter. We offer an inclusive space where you can thrive, be yourself, and grow alongside a team dedicated to making a meaningful impact to the world of gaming.
   

  

 We’re all-in on the future and our most ambitious Battlefield yet. Want to be part of something special? Read on.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Working under a Lead sound designer, you will work within a small and well defined area of a project's sound design.
* You will create content in line with existing designs and audio direction and implement this into the game using the Frostbite game engine.
* Through playtesting and feedback sessions you will refine the content and its supporting logic to ensure it is fit for purpose and improve quality.
* As a part of the Audio team, you will provide and respond to Audio feedback and be an active mixer for your assets, and provide feedback on the title's overall mix.


**Skills**
* Experience of designing sounds for interactive or linear media.
* Proficient skills with modern studio hardware, editing and designing techniques, and software such as Reaper, ProTools, Sound Forge, Waves, IzoTope RX.
* Desire to develop your game audio production, implementation, and engineering skills.
* Outstanding "critical listening" skills.
* Knowledge of audio middleware, e.g. WWISE, FMOD, Unreal, Unity are beneficial but not essential.
* Knowledge of graphical audio programming, e.g. Reaktor, Max-MSP, Pure Data, is beneficial.


**Eligibility**
* You must be currently enrolled at university or education provider with a planned internship period planned into the education plan, (e.g. LiA)
* You are eligible to work in Stockholm, Sweden, without the need for visa/relocation support
* You are available to commence a full-time 6 month placement in autumn 2026.


 Help us make play happen. Apply now with an up-to-date CV and show-reel (sound design skills in linear or interactive media) in
 **English** 
 , explaining why you would like to join EA for this internship position.
   

  

**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Product Manager - Product Development
description:
Silex Microsystems is the world’s leading pure-play MEMS foundry, partnering with global clients to develop some of the most advanced MEMS products in the world.
 



  





 As a Product Manager in our Product Development team, you will play a key role in pushing the boundaries of what is technically possible — working hands-on with cutting-edge processes while driving complex development projects forward. This is a highly technical, project-driven role where you combine microfabrication expertise with strong project management to take products from concept to market.
 



  





 Read more about Silex here.
 



  





**The Team** 




 You will join our Product Development team of around 40 colleagues, including Product Managers, Process Design Engineers and CAD Engineers, and you’ll be reporting to a Group Manager.
 



 The team works at the core of Silex’s offering — translating customer designs into manufacturable MEMS products. Collaboration is key, and you will work closely with both internal experts and international customers in a highly knowledge-driven environment.
 



  





**The role** 




 In this role, you will lead the development of MEMS products from early concept through prototype, combining technical depth with structured project management.
 



 Customers typically come to Silex with a design concept, and together with our CAD Engineers and technical experts, you will evaluate and shape that design to ensure it is manufacturable. Early in the process, you will bring together specialists from different process areas to define a robust concept and create a scalable process flow, and a recipe for the new product. In this concept phase, you will be ensuring that all critical aspects are considered before the customer approves the concept, and the project moves into prototyping.
 



  





 As the project progresses into the prototype phase, you will own the overall execution — ensuring timelines are met, risks are managed, and technical challenges are solved along the way.
 



 A part of the role is hands-on work in the cleanroom. After each process step, you will evaluate the outcome using tools such as SEM analysis to determine whether the desired result has been achieved. Based on your findings, you will work closely with Process Engineers to tweak parameters in processes to achieve the desired result. Finally, you’re responsible for the delivery of the final prototype to the client.
 



  





 To ensure a strong start, you’ll receive hands-on training from an experienced colleague to familiarize you with our development process and tools before being in client discussions. After a while, you will start acting as the technical interface towards customers, leading discussions around progress, challenges, and next steps.
 



  





**In this role, you will** 



* Drive MEMS development projects from concept to the delivery of a final prototype.
* Evaluate customer designs and ensure manufacturability together with CAD and process experts.
* Define process flows and build fabrication recipes for new products.
* Bring together cross-functional experts early in the project to ensure a robust concept.
* Analyze process results using SEM and other characterization methods.
* Collaborate with Process Engineers to achieve desired results after each fabrication step.
* Own project timelines, order portfolios, progress, and delivery.
* Identify risks, troubleshoot issues, and ensure forward momentum.
* Act as the technical lead towards customers.
* Lead technical discussions, reporting, and planning.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* A Master’s degree or PhD with coursework in microfabrication/ nanotechnology.
* Experience with microfabrication through work or academic research, ideally using processes like lithography, plasma deposition and plasma etching.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to discuss technical topics in English. Swedish is considered highly beneficial as a lot of internal documentation is written in Swedish.
* Previous experience with customer interaction.
* Several years of industry experience in production environments, leading technical projects.



  





**To succeed in the role, we also think that you are** 



* A clear and adaptable communicator, able to engage both colleagues and customers.
* Organized and methodical in how you drive projects forward.
* Curious and eager to deepen your expertise in MEMS.
* Business-minded and focused on delivering value to customers.



  





**About The Recruitment Process** 




 We review applications on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible. To apply, please attach your CV or LinkedIn-profile, and answer a few questions.
 



  





 If you progress through the full process, you will start with a digital interview with one of our Talent Acquisition Partners, followed by a personality and logical ability test. Next, you will meet with one of our Group Managers together with a Talent Acquisition Partner for an in-person interview, and finally with our VP of Product Development for a concluding interview. Before an offer, we also conduct reference checks, a background check, and a drug test. Randomized alcohol- and drug testing is conducted for all of our employees during the employment.
 



  





**Silex** 
 is the world’s largest and most advanced pure-play MEMS foundry. With a team of expert engineers, operators, technicians, engineers, support staff, specialists, and much more besides, Silex transforms the visionary ideas of the world’s leading MEMS innovators into reality.

title: Software Engineers
description:
*MSAB is a global leader in digital forensic technology for mobile device examination and analysis. The MSAB vision is to empower every investigation with digital forensic solutions – for a safer world. A core value is to run an ethics-driven company with innovation and results. The sole focus of MSAB is on delivering high quality digital forensic solutions to collect, review, analyze and manage data. MSAB is a trusted partner to Law Enforcement, Defence Forces, Government Agencies and Forensic Laboratories in democratic countries throughout the world enabling them to investigate crime, gather intelligence, investigate fraud and fight corruption.* 




  





 To our new Stockholm office we’re looking for two engineers to join our Unicore team. You enjoy building systems that are not only functional, but also efficient, scalable, and thoughtfully designed. This is a chance to work with technology with a purpose – to create a safer world.
 



  





**The job** 




 At MSAB, the Unicore team is responsible for the core of our digital forensics platform, including UNIFY and the XRY file format (Core API). We’re now working on the next generation of UNIFY, and this is an opportunity to help shape it from the inside.
 



  





 In this role, you will work with core system development where performance and reliability are critical. You’ll be dealing with distributed systems and data-intensive workloads, contributing to architectural decisions with long-term impact, and exploring how to best leverage hardware such as CPU and GPU.
 



  





 Our current tech stack includes C99, C++20, and C# (.NET 8/10), along with gRPC, SQLite and PostgreSQL, running across both Windows and Linux environments.
 



  





**Who You Are** 




 We believe you will thrive in this environment if you have a genuine interest in programming and problem-solving, and if you care about performance, clean design, and user experience. You likely enjoy systems engineering, think in terms of trade-offs, and prefer solving meaningful problems over fitting into rigid roles. An appreciation for simplicity and keeping dependencies lean will serve you well.
 



  





**Your Experience** 




 You will benefit from your experience with DevOps and CI/CD practices, containerization with Docker, or cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure which is considered a plus.
 



 You will be part of a focused team working close to the core of the product, where your decisions matter and your code has real impact.
 



  





 Interested, or know someone who might be? Reach out or apply — we’d love to connect.
 



  





 There is much more to talk about, like values, our growth plans, technology choices etc., but we save that for the interview.
 



  





 Welcome to apply now!
 



  





 For more information about MSAB, please visit: http://www.msab.com
 



  





**What we can offer** 




 Create a safer world with us!
 



 As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.
 



 Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.
 



 We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.
 



 Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.
 



 Are you up for the challenge?
 



 Department Development Role C++ Developer Locations Stockholm, Sweden Remote status Hybrid

title: AI Engineer
description:
**AI Engineer (GenAI & ML Systems)**
**Help AI move from experimentation to production impact.**
 What if your work didn’t stop at prototypes — but became part of how a global business operates, makes decisions, and ensures trust in its systems?
   

  

 At ASSA ABLOY Entrance Systems in Stockholm, you’ll help build AI systems such as AI assistants, knowledge retrieval tools, and automation services integrated into business workflows.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 AI adoption is moving beyond experimentation into production-grade systems that must be reliable and actively used in real products and operations.
   

  

 We are scaling how AI is used across the business – and need engineers who can turn models and ideas into robust services that integrate with real products and processes.
   

  

**The role**
 You’ll take ownership of designing and delivering production AI systems end-to-end — from integrating LLMs and retrieval pipelines to building backend services and running them in the cloud.
   

  

 This is a hands-on engineering role where you build, ship, and operate real systems into production environments.
   

  

**What You’ll Work On**
* Build and ship GenAI applications (RAG systems, LLM-powered assistants, agent-based workflows for analysis and knowledge retrieval)
* Develop production Python backend services and APIs powering AI features in production systems
* Design and implement end-to-end ML system architectures (models, data pipelines, retrieval systems, and domain logic)
* Deploy and operate AI services in Azure (including Azure OpenAI), with some AWS exposure
* Work with modern LLM stacks (prompt engineering, retrieval optimization, orchestration, evaluation, and tool use)
* Translate real operational needs into production AI systems, working closely with stakeholders and engineers


**What Will Help You Succeed**
* MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence or relevant fields — or up to 3 years of experience in AI/ML or data science.
* Strong Python skills and experience building real applications, services, or data-driven systems.
* Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals.
* Hands-on experience with Generative AI (LLMs, RAG systems, or agent-based applications).
* Familiarity with modern AI tooling such as LLM APIs (e.g. Azure OpenAI), vector databases, embeddings, and retrieval systems.
* Experience working with production-oriented systems such as APIs, backend services, data pipelines, or deployed ML/AI solutions, with awareness of constraints like performance, scalability, reliability, and cost.


 We value strong fundamentals and practical experience working with real systems more than formal experience length.
   

  

**Why ASSA ABLOY Entrance Systems**
 You’ll work in a GenAI & Data Science team building AI systems that move beyond experimentation into production environments.
   

  

* Modern GenAI stack — Work hands-on with LLMs, RAG pipelines, Azure OpenAI, and vector databases
* Build & ship focus — Take features from idea → implementation → production deployment and real usage
* Engineering ownership — High autonomy over system design, architecture, and implementation decisions
* Growth environment — Be part of building a modern AI engineering capability from an early stage
* Work–life balance — Hybrid working and a sustainable engineering culture focused on long-term quality


**This role is offered as an initial one-year fixed-term contract, with a strong intention to transition into a permanent position based on performance and business needs.**
**Ready to build production AI systems?**
 If you’re motivated by building AI systems that go beyond experimentation and are deployed in real-world operational use — this is your opportunity.
   

  

 Apply today and help shape how AI systems are engineered, shipped, and operated across ASSA ABLOY.
   

  

 We review applications continuously, so don’t wait.
   

  

 We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here. To make sure your personal data stays protected, we do not review applications sent via email or post. If you have questions about the role or process, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner at lea.rein@assaabloy.com.
   

  

**Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.**
**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Junior Art Director
description:
**About Humans since 1982:**
 We are a pioneering studio based in Stockholm, working at the intersection of design, art, and technology. Our kinetic installations, including
 *A million Times* 
 and
 *ClockClock* 
 , have found audiences around the world. Among our collectors are institutions such as the Vitra Design Museum, companies including OpenAI, as well as global thought leaders across business and culture.
   

  

 Our work is guided by a simple idea:
 **“** 
 Form follows fascination
 **.”** 
 Curiosity is where every project begins. While the outcomes often take the form of physical objects, we approach them dramaturgically, arranging anticipation, surprise, and resolution.
   

  

**About the role:**
 We are looking for a
 **Junior Art Director** 
 to
 **translate the studio’s creative vision into a coherent visual universe** 
 across all touch points. This is a role for someone curious and passionate, with the ambition to help shape the next chapter of a pioneering brand with global reach.
   

  

 At Humans since 1982, storytelling and visual expression are central to how our work is experienced and understood. Photography, film, installations, digital applications and printed matter together form the universe through which the studio’s work is presented to the world.
   

  

 Working closely with the Creative Director and the Marketing & Communication Lead, the Junior Art Director will ensure that the visual language of Humans since 1982 remains precise, distinctive, and consistent across all platforms. For the right person, this is an opportunity to contribute to building a brand that moves onto the global stage.
   

  

**In this role you will:**
* Art direct and produce photo and film assets and content
* Translate campaign and product concepts into visual storytelling across channels (social media, newsletters, press releases, website, and campaigns)
* Supervise externally produced renders, animations, visual material, and text
* Maintain a consistent brand aesthetic across all touch points
* Contribute to campaign narratives and visual concepts
* Prepare and publish content across digital channels
* Develop visual material for sales presentations, pitches, brochures, and exhibitions
* Develops the design of packaging, manuals, and certificates, manages its production
* Maintain and implement the studio’s brand guidelines
* Copywriting
* Manages/documents all visual brand assets


**What we hope to see:**
 We are looking for someone with a strong visual sensibility and a pragmatic, hands-on approach, combined with a passion for storytelling.
   

  

* Strong visual taste and aesthetic judgement
* Editorial mindset with good writing and storytelling skills
* Hands-on and motivated to bring ideas into execution
* Comfortable directing photographers, stylists, and external creatives
* Organised and detail-oriented
* Passion for design, art, architecture, or luxury culture


 Experience in luxury, collectible design, or design-driven brands is highly valued.
   

  

**What we offer:**
* Competitive salary
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Wellness allowance
* A unique opportunity to work at the intersection of art, design, and technology—rare in Sweden
* Personal growth in a high-end, globally recognised studio


*Please note that we will only start reviewing candidates in the beginning of May for this role*
**For this role we would love to see a portfolio of your previous work that you are particularly proud of as it helps us a lot to understand the fit for this role. Please attach a link or a file to your application.**
**Culture at Humans since 1982**
 At Humans since 1982, we work in a small but distinctive field where design, art, and engineering meet. Our studio creates collectible pieces that require patience, precision, and a genuine fascination for how things work, unfold and surprise over time.
   

  

 We are a curious and collaborative team. Everyone in the studio is trusted to take ownership of their work, think independently, and contribute ideas beyond their immediate role. At the same time, our projects are collective efforts, built through dialogue, shared curiosity, and a respect for each other’s craft.
   

  

 The studio still operates with an entrepreneurial spirit. We are flexible and move quickly when ideas take shape, but we also recognise that meaningful work takes care and attention. As we continue our journey, every person in the team helps shape not only the work we create, but the culture of the studio.
   

  

 Founded in 2009
   

  

 Co-workers 11
   

  

**humanssince1982.com** 
**/
   

  

 Instagram: humanssince1982**

title: Trafikplanerare, Solna stad
description:
*Ä du en driven person med kunskap inom trafikplanering eller trafiksäkerhet? Välkommen att söka tjänsten som trafikplanerare hos oss!*




**Om oss**




 Stadsmiljöavdelningen på Tekniska förvaltningen ansvarar för förvaltning, drift och underhåll samt
   

  





 utveckling av Solna stads torg, parker, naturområden, gator och vägar. Vi arbetar för att Solna ska ha en ren, snygg och trygg stadsmiljö med god och säker framkomlighet. Avdelningen organiserar verksamheten inom tre enheter; park och mark, gata, trafik och tillstånd samt stadsmiljöprojekt. I rollen som trafikplanerare tillhör du enheten för gata, trafik- och tillstånd. 
   

  





**Vårt erbjudande**




 • Ett meningsfullt arbete.
   

  





 • Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter.
   

  





 • En hybrid arbetsplats med flexibla arbetstider.
   

  





 • Nära ledarskap och ett kompetent team.
   

  





 • Lokaler centralt i Solna med goda kommunikationsvägar.
   

  





**Vad innebär arbetet?**




 Som trafikplanerare hos Solna stad blir du en del av arbetet med att utveckla stadens trafikmiljö. Du kommer att arbeta med trafikfrågor kopplade till stadens gator och offentliga rum och bidra till att skapa hållbara och trafiksäkra lösningar.
   

  





 Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med kollegor inom staden samt med konsulter, entreprenörer och andra externa aktörer.
   

  





 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer bland annat innebära att:
 


* delta i planering och utveckling av stadens trafikmiljö
* ta fram underlag, analyser och utredningar inom trafik och framkomlighet och trafiksäkerhet
* bidra i projekt kopplade till trafik, mobilitet och trafiksäkerhet
* handläggning av enklare trafikärenden och remisser
* delta i dialog med invånare, konsulter och andra förvaltningar
* bidra till utveckling av åtgärder inom trafiksäkerhet, gång-, cykel- och skolvägsplanering
* följa upp åtgärder och bidra till utveckling av stadens trafikarbete



**Vem söker vi?**




 Vi söker dig som har
 


* eftergymnasial utbildning inom trafikplanering, samhällsplanering, samhällsbyggnad eller likvärdigt området alternativt har arbetslivserfarenhet som bedöms likvärdig
* grundläggande kunskap inom trafikplanering och/eller trafiksäkerhet
* god datorvana och hög IT-mognad
* B-körkort



 Vi ser det som meriterande om du har
 


* erfarenhet av arbete inom kommun, konsultverksamhet eller offentlig sektor
* erfarenhet av GIS eller analysverktyg inom trafik
* kunskap om trafikregler och trafikföreskrifter



 Vi söker dig som driver ditt arbete framåt och är självgående i din roll, samtidigt har du en god samarbetsförmåga och bidrar till ett öppet och konstruktivt klimat i teamet. Rollen kräver att du är strategiskt och att du arbetar strukturerat med ordning och planering för att säkerställa kvalitet och leverans. Du är serviceorienterad och har god förmåga att förstå andras behov och förutsättningar.
   

  





**Mer information om ansökan**




 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan innehållandes CV senast den
 **3 maj 2026.** 
 De frågor som du får besvara när du skickar in din ansökan kommer att ligga till grund för det första
   

  





 urvalet vi gör.
   

  





 Vid frågor om tjänsten vänligen kontakta Enhetschef gata, trafik och tillståndsenheten, Josefin
   

  





 Hammarström på josefin.hammarstrom@solna.se. 
   

  





 Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vårt rekryteringssystem. Solna stad har gjort medieval för samtliga rekryteringar, så vi undanber oss därför samtal från annonssäljare eller säljare av rekryteringstjänster.
   

  





 Har du skyddade personuppgifter? Registrera inte din ansökan på webbplatsen/Varbi, utan ta kontakt med rekryterande chef för att veta hur du ska skicka in din ansökan. Du bör vara varsam med vilken information du delar i din ansökan. Delge därför bara information som är relevant för den aktuella tjänsten.

title: Teknisk Projektledare
description:
Vi söker nu en erfaren Teknisk projektledare som vill driva digital utveckling inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde samt leda och driva verksamhetsperspektiv från ett behov till färdig och driftsatt funktionalitet.
   

  





 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde är en del av Region Stockholm. Tjänsten är placerad på Torsplan under verksamhetsstöd Digitala tjänster, enheten System och Teknik.
   

  





****Vi erbjuder dig****




 SLSO erbjuder goda utvecklingsmöjligheter, ett bra samarbetsklimat och flexibla arbetsformer, inklusive möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån vissa dagar. Kulturen präglas av att vi stöttar varandra och har roligt tillsammans.
   

  





 Förmåner hos Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) bedriver hälso- och sjukvård för invånarna i Region Stockholm och ansvarar för IT-tjänster som stödjer vårdens arbete.
   

  





 Som teknisk projektledare hos oss ansvarar du för att planera, leda och följa upp projekt inom teknik och IT som resulterar i förbättrade förutsättningar för regionens kärnverksamhet, framför allt inom hälso- och sjukvård. Du driver projekt effektivt från tidig idé genom förstudier till införande, utbildning, överlämning och etablerad nytta i verksamheten. Du ansvarar även för projektets riskhantering och budget.
   

  





 Du arbetar nära IT-organisationen och fungerar som en central länk mellan verksamhet, tekniska lösningar och externa leverantörer.
   

  





 Du förväntas ha stark teknisk förståelse, kunna driva förändring i större organisationer och ha erfarenhet av att hantera beroenden mellan flera tekniska områden. En mycket god förmåga att kunna vara en brygga mellan verksamhet och teknik är grundläggande hos dig som person. Din förmåga att sammanställa beslutsunderlag, presentationer samt strukturera och genomföra styrgruppsmöten med ledare och högre chefer är mycket viktigt.
   

  





**Exempel** 
**på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Planera, leda, samordna och administrera projektet genom alla projektfaser
* Uppnå projektets målsättning och delmål i enlighet med beslutad tidplan och budget
* Förankra i organisationen
* Överlämna projekts leverabler till utpekad förvaltningsorganisation.
* Stötta projektägare/beställare i att ta fram projektdirektiv och nödvändiga underlag enligt Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) anvisningar samt styr- och projektmodeller
* Driva aktiviteter och löpande rapportera framdrift och risker till styrgrupp
* Ansvara för projektets budget och resursallokering
* Kommunicera effektivt med ledning, tekniska team och externa leverantörer



****Kvalifikationer****



* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande kompetenser förvärvade genom annan utbildning i kombination med lång och relevant arbetserfarenhet
* Flerårig ledarerfarenhet som program- eller projektledning eller förändringsledning
* Erfarenhet av stora organisationer eller koncerner
* Erfarenhet av att driva förändring
* Erfarenhet av projektmetodik (till exempel Projektil, PMI, Prince2, PPS eller liknande)
* God förmåga att kommunicera både muntlig och skriftligt på svenska



 Det är meriterande om du också har:
 


* Erfarenhet av offentlig sektor
* Erfarenhet av Hälso- och sjukvårdsområdet



**Personliga egenskaper**




 Du arbetar strukturerat, noggrant och självständigt med hög integritet. Du bemöter människor professionellt och hanterar information tryggt. Rollen kräver serviceförmåga, flexibilitet och snabba svar. Vi söker dig som är analytisk, lösningsorienterad och pedagogisk, med god samarbetsförmåga och prestigelöst arbetssätt. Stor vikt läggs vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  





****Mer information och ansökan****




 Sista ansökningsdag är
 **17 maj 2026.**




 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  





 Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att den inte behöver tas i anspråk för intern omplacering, enligt gällande regelverk.
   

  





**Vid patientnära arbete inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde:**




  

 - tillämpas registerkontroll före beslut om anställning enligt SLSO:s övergripande anvisning för registerkontroll vid anställning.
   

  





  

 - ska medarbetare som kommer att ha patientkontakt genomgå nyanställningsundersökning, enligt gällande direktiv, vilket sker genom företagshälsovården innan anställning.
   

  





  

 - krävs, förutom svensk yrkeslegitimation, goda kunskaper i svenska språket motsvarande nivå C1 enligt den gemensamma europeiska referensramen (GERS). Samma krav är vägledande vad gäller icke-legitimerad personal med patientkontakt.
   

  





**Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) är en av Sveriges största vårdgivare med 11 600 medarbetare. Vi erbjuder hälso- och sjukvård i Region Stockholms regi inom psykiatri, primärvård, geriatrik, ASIH, närakuter, somatisk specialistvård, habilitering och hälsa samt hjälpmedel. I samverkan med Karolinska Institutet bedriver vi forskning, utbildning och utveckling. Läs mer om SLSO här.**




****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  





 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

title: Transformation Manager
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

 Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.
   

  

 At CIS, we enable organisations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience - helping clients modernise their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 Join our team as a Transformation Manager and play a key role in driving transformation initiatives. You will lead complex transition projects within the portfolio of cloud & infrastructure services. Your expertise will ensure seamless execution of transformation initiatives and successful delivery of large-scale projects.
   

  

**Your profile**
* Proven experience in transformations and managing large-scale technical projects in the infra, cloud and/or cyber field
* Proven track records from migration projects both On preem and cloud, whith customers in the Enterprise segment
* Strong understanding of transformation models and project management methodologies
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to mentor and develop high-performing teams
* Proactive approach to risk management and problem-solving
* Bachelor’s degree required; MBA strongly preferred
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Opportunities to work on real-world problems and help transform leading organizations
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


 Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.
   

  

*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Backend Engineer
description:
**Backend Engineer – Cloud and Mobile Wallet**
**Build technology that powers next-generation hotel access.**
 Your work won’t sit quietly in a backlog. It will shape contactless mobile key solutions used around the world — and you’ll have the trust and freedom to do your best work along the way.
   

  

**Why this role matters**
 At ASSA ABLOY, technology plays a direct role in creating a safer, more open world . As a
 **Backend Engineer** 
 , you’ll be part of a team building cloud‑driven services that provide smartphone-enabled hotel door access for global hotel chains.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who wants to own meaningful problems, contribute to technical direction, and work in an environment where quality, collaboration, and long-term thinking genuinely matter.
   

  

**The role**
 You’ll take end-to-end ownership of features for our mobile wallet initiative, from early technical design through to production and continuous improvement. Working closely with product managers, architects, and fellow engineers, you’ll help turn complex requirements into secure, scalable solutions.
   

  

 You’ll be trusted to challenge assumptions, surface risks early, and make sound technical decisions — bringing calm, pragmatism, and clarity to complex engineering discussions.
   

  

**What You’ll Work On**
* Deliver meaningful features end-to-end — design, build, test, deploy, and evolve cloud-native services.
* Build modern, scalable systems — primarily in Java or Kotlin, collaborating with frontend engineers on mobile wallet integration.
* Shape architecture and technical direction — apply event-driven patterns, CQRS, and secure cloud design principles.
* Lead cloud-native development — design and operate services on AWS, leveraging CI/CD pipelines and automation tools.
* Monitor and maintain system performance, reliability, and security for distributed applications.
* Collaborate with international partners and hotel brands to deliver industry-leading solutions.


**What Will Help You Succeed**
* Solid experience building backend systems in cloud-native, distributed environments.
* Strong ownership mindset — comfortable taking features from idea to production.
* Hands-on cloud and DevOps experience — particularly AWS, CI/CD, and deployment automation.
* First experience in Kotlin or strong willingness to learn; familiarity with frontend integration is a plus.
* Collaborative, proactive communicator who thrives in agile, cross-functional teams.


**Why ASSA ABLOY**
 At ASSA ABLOY, you’ll join a global organisation with a distinctly Scandinavian approach to work : trust over control, clarity over noise, and people over process.
   

  

* Meaningful mission — Your software enables secure, contactless hotel experiences worldwide, improving both guest safety and operational efficiency.
* Innovation at scale — Work with mobile wallet technology, cloud services, and IoT in collaboration with leading partners like Apple and Google.
* Autonomy and trust — Make decisions, influence design, and own your work from idea to impact.
* Growth and development — Deepen technical expertise, learn continuously, and explore opportunities across teams and borders.
* Work–life balance — Flexible working, hybrid options, and a culture that supports sustainable performance.


**Ready to build something that matters?**
 If you’re looking for a backend developer role where your skills, judgement, and wellbeing are genuinely valued, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and help shape the future of smart hotel access.
   

  

**We review applications continuously, so don’t wait.**
 We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here. To protect your personal data, we do not review applications sent via email or post. For questions about the role, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner.
   

  

**Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.**
**We are the ASSA ABLOY Group**
 Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
   

  

 As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
   

  

 As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.

title: Mötesbokare/SDR
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning:** 




 SaleScale är en snabbväxande mötesbokningsbyrå baserad i Stockholm, specialiserad på att hjälpa några av Nordens mest välkända Media-, SaaS- och tech-bolag att accelerera sin försäljning. Genom ett starkt nätverk och beprövade säljprocesser levererar vi kvalificerade affärsmöten som driver tillväxt för våra kunder - och karriärmöjligheter för våra mötesbokare.
 



  





**Vår tjänst / produkt:** 




 Vi erbjuder kvalificerad mötesbokning som tjänst till B2B-bolag. Våra mötesbokare agerar som en förlängd arm till kundens säljteam och står för att boka in kvalificerade möten till deras säljare. Vi arbetar med företag inom SaaS, media och flera andra branscher där efterfrågan på kvalitativa leads är hög.
 



  





**Referenser och bakgrunden till bolaget:** 




 SaleScale grundades av erfarna entreprenörer med bakgrund inom försäljning, tech och bolagsbyggande. Vår affärsidé bygger på att kombinera struktur, modern teknik och starkt relationsskapande för att skapa långsiktigt värde åt våra kunder. Bland våra uppdragsgivare finns flera av Nordens mest välrenommerade bolag.
 



  





**Teamet och kulturen:** 




 Hos SaleScale blir du en del av ett energifyllt, måldrivet och stöttande team. Här råder ingen traditionell toppstyrning - vi tror på samarbete, frihet under ansvar och kontinuerlig feedback. Du arbetar som självständig konsult, men med en stark gemenskap, coaching och en tydlig väg till personlig utveckling.
 



  





 -
 



  





**Kravprofil:** 




  





**Ansvarsområde:** 



* Boka kvalificerade möten genom telefonkontakt med beslutsfattare inom B2B.
* Representera några av Nordens och Europas mest spännande bolag inom SaaS, tech och media.



  





**Arbetsuppgifter:** 



* Daglig kontakt med potentiella kunder genom kalla samtal och uppföljningar.
* Strukturera och dokumentera prospekt och aktiviteter i CRM-system.
* Arbeta nära både kund och Sale Scale-teamet för att säkerställa kvalitet och resultat.



  





**Krav och meriter:** 



* Kunskap och erfarenhet inom försäljning är ett måste
* Erfarenhet som SDR (Sales Development Representative), gärna från andra SaaS- eller IT-bolag, är starkt meriterande.
* Telefonvana är ett måste.
* Grundläggande CRM-kunskaper (t.ex. HubSpot) är ett plus, men inget krav.
* Du bör vara van vid ett högt tempo, kunna hantera avslag och drivas av tydliga mål.
* Flytande svenska krävs, och god engelska är meriterande.



  





**Personlighet och specifika egenskaper:** 



* Vi söker dig som har ett starkt eget driv, uthållighet, tydlig kommunikation och en positiv attityd.
* Du är formbar, tar gärna emot feedback och trivs i ett målinriktat sammanhang.



  





**Vilka utvecklingsmöjligheter och förmåner erbjuder vi?** 



* Vi erbjuder antingen anställning eller frilans/konsult upplägg det beror på vad som funkar för just dig.
* VI ger dig en tydlig utvecklings plan från junior SDR, SDR och Senior SDR men även beroende på din prestation kan du utvecklas till roller som team-lead eller Account manager/closer.
* Du får även kontinuerlig coaching, relevant utbildning och chansen att bygga upp din portfölj av starka kundrelationer.



  





**Rekryteringsprocess:** 



1. Första telefonintervju med grundare.
2. Andra intervju med grundare och/eller senior kollega.
3. Slutintervju, signering och onboarding!

title: Test Engineer
description:
**Where Testing Meets Technology—Join Alfa Laval’s R&D Team**
**Alfa Laval is a global leader in engineering innovation and sustainability. We’re looking for a passionate Test Engineer to help advance our HSS (High Speed Separation) product portfolio, from concept to reality and beyond. If you thrive on hands-on engineering and want to make a real impact, this is your opportunity to shape the future of technology!**
 As a Test Engineer, you will be part of a collaborative team of 8 Test Engineers, working closely together on projects and sharing knowledge. You will play a pivotal role in product development projects and R&D activities, executing development and verification testing to ensure our products meet rigorous standards and regulatory requirements. You will work across all Alfa Laval divisions—Ocean, Food & Pharma, and Energy—giving you broad exposure and impact.
   

  

 Most of your work will be based in our lab in Flemingsberg, but you will also have opportunities to work in the field. You’ll be close to the product, seeing the direct impact of your work, providing feedback to designers, and driving real improvements. Your hands-on testing and reporting will influence design reviews and project decisions, making your role highly visible and impactful.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
* Responsible for execution of development, and verification testing as part of product development projects and other R&D activities.
* Create test plans based on product specifications regulatory requirements, outlining test objectives, methods, schedules and acceptance criteria.
* Lead installation meetings with support function within the innovation lab
* Define test setups by selecting appropriate tools, equipment configuration in collaboration with project team.
* Prepare test object for testing by performing service and mechanical assembly according to manuals or instructions.
* Evaluate test results through data analysis and mechanical inspection, identify deviations from expected performance, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to investigate root causes and implement corrective actions.
* Produce test Report that document procedures, result, deviations and conclusions supporting design reviews and project decisions.
* Participate in development of new technical solutions and testing methods, in close collaboration with other parts of the R&D organization


**Your Skills**
* Mechanical background or similar
* Experience in product testing, development, or R&D; experience in testing at other companies is a plus
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Proficiency in data analysis and mechanical inspection
* Excellent communication and teamwork abilities
* Open, forward-thinking, proactive, and eager to learn new things and technologies
* Commitment to safety and quality standards
* Good command of both English and Swedish, spoken and written


**What’s in it for you?**
 A challenging position in an international, open, and friendly environment where we help each other grow. You value being part of a larger organization that develops important solutions, while occasionally having the opportunity to be more creative.
   

  

 You’ll work in a brand-new office in Flemingsberg, easily accessible by public transport, with parking facilities and a modern bicycle garage. Our laboratory is among the most modern in Stockholm!
   

  

**For more information, please contact**
 Gijs van der Post, Talent Acquisition Partner, gijs.vanderpost@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Einar Hallgren, Manager Testing Technology, einar.hallgren@alfalaval.com
   

  

**Union information**
 Anders Jansson, Unionen, Anders.Jansson@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Axel Scharing, Akademikerna, Axel.Scharing@alfalaval.com
   

  

**Alcohol and drug testing**
 As part of Alfa Laval’s commitment to a safe and healthy workplace, alcohol and drug testing is applied during the pre‑employment process.
   

  

**Medical check-up**
 This position is subject to mandatory medical examinations in accordance with AFS 2023:15.
   

  

*We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioral traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games.  Playing games is mandatory.*
*Please submit your application via our website. Applications by e-mail will not be considered.*

title: Data Architect
description:
**Vi söker en Data Architect** 
 Vi rekryterar inte till en specifik roll, utan söker istället ständigt efter nya duktiga kollegor som har en positiv inställning och som vill lära sig och dela med sig av sina kunskaper. Med den inställningen vet vi att du kan lyckas som konsult hos ten10. Därför lyssnar vi på dig och ser, utifrån din erfarenhet och kompetens, vilken typ av uppdrag där du trivs och utvecklas bäst.
   

  

 Hos ten10 blir du en del av en organisation som värdesätter den personliga relationen, där varje individ får vara med och påverka både sin egen och ten10s utveckling.
   

  

 Vi tror på att bygga ett bolag av olika personer som bidrar på olika sätt till att vi alla trivs och lyckas. Utöver att göra skillnad i de uppdrag vi gemensamt väljer utifrån ditt intresse och din utveckling är du en viktig del av ett framåtlutat bolag där våra medarbetare alltid står i fokus.
   

  

**Hos oss ser man…** 
 …positivt på utmaningar
   

  

 …positivt på att samarbeta men klarar också av att vara självgående när det behövs
   

  

 …positivt på nya teknologier, data och komplexa problem
   

  

 …positivt på kompetensutveckling och att ständigt bli bättre
   

  

 …positivt på att vara med och påverka
   

  

**Att vara konsult hos ten10** 
 Vi vill ständigt bli bättre och är i en spännande resa, därför söker vi nu fler Data Architects.
   

  

 Som Data Architect-konsult hos ten10 har du en central roll i att forma och vidareutveckla våra kunders datalandskap. Du säkerställer att dataplattformar, informationsmodeller och arkitekturval stödjer både verksamhetens behov och framtida satsningar inom exempelvis Analytics, Machine Learning och AI.
   

  

 Du arbetar ofta i gränslandet mellan verksamhet, IT och data-/plattformsteam och bidrar med riktning, struktur och långsiktighet i datadrivna initiativ.
   

  

**I din roll som Data Architect…** 
 …har du ett genuint intresse av att förstå verksamhetens behov och översätta dem till hållbara datalösningar
   

  

 …har du flera års erfarenhet inom data, BI, analytics eller närliggande områden, gärna i en arkitekt- eller ledande roll
   

  

 …har du god förståelse för informationsmodellering, datamodellering och arkitekturmönster för moderna dataplattformar
   

  

 …har du erfarenhet av molnbaserade dataplattaformer såsom Azure, AWS eller GCP
   

  

 …har du arbetat med lakehouse-, data warehouse- eller streaming-arkitekturer
   

  

 …förstår du hur dataplattformar används för analytics, ML och AI-lösningar
   

  

 …är du bekväm i dialog med både verksamhet och teknik
   

  

 …trivs du i agila arbetssätt och ofta tar en rådgivande eller vägledande roll
   

  

 …är du noggrann, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad
   

  

 …är du flytande i svenska och engelska
   

  

**Vad får man ut av att vara en ten10are?** 
 Hos ten10 är det viktigt att hitta en sund balans mellan privatliv och arbetsliv. Vi arbetar tillsammans för att hitta ett upplägg som fungerar i din vardag – både när det gäller uppdrag, arbetssätt och ersättning.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en av marknadens mest attraktiva lönemodeller, där du får tydlig kompensation för det värde du skapar.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid gemenskap och kunskapsdelning genom AWs, resor, gemensamma aktiviteter och erfarenhetsutbyte.
   

  

 Vår verksamhet bygger på våra medarbetare – och vår ambition är att skapa rätt förutsättningar för just dig.

title: Data Scientist - Energy Optimization
description:
10% of Europe's CO₂ emissions are caused by residential heating, and energy bills are out of control. Aira is here to change that.
   

  

 With our intelligent Aira Heat Pump at the heart, we're making the switch to clean energy-tech easier and more affordable. Helping Europe turn off gas and slashing energy costs one home at a time.
   

  

 Founded in 2022, and with 1000+ employees and counting, Aira is driving the clean energy revolution by providing homes with modern clean energy-tech solutions such as solar power, battery storage solutions and heat pumps. With a state-of-the-art production facility in Poland, an HQ in Stockholm, Sweden, and hubs across the UK, Germany, and Italy, Aira is well on track to install clean energy-tech into 5 million homes by 2034.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In the Energy Optimization team, we build optimization and ML models that actively control when the heat pump runs, when the battery charges or discharges, and when to export energy to the grid. We are now building new flexibility capabilities by coordinating fleets of homes to support the grid when it matters most.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a Data Scientist to join the team. You’ll lead projects end-to-end: shape the problem, build forecasting and optimization models, run experiments, and work closely with Product, Engineering and Design to ship customer-facing AI solutions.
   

  

 We value clear communication, thoughtful collaboration, and a constructive approach to problem solving. If you enjoy making measurable progress, turning messy real-world signals into decisions people can trust, and moving projects forward even when the path is not fully defined, we would love to hear from you.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Translate real-world control problems into optimization models that minimizes customers’ energy bills.
* Develop and improve forecasting and decision-support models enabling optimal control schedules for customers’ home energy devices.
* Design and run experiments on real customer systems, evaluate impact, and turn insights into product decisions.
* Work closely with the team to bring models into production.
* Work across the full data stack, including data pipelines, feature engineering, deployment and monitoring.
* Lead initiatives from discovery to production impact. You set direction, align with stakeholders across product and engineering to deliver outcomes even when the path is not fully defined.
* Communicate clearly to technical and non-technical audiences, explaining trade-offs, uncertainty, and what is good enough to ship.


**What You Bring To The Team**
* Several years of professional experience as a Data Scientist, Optimization Engineer, Applied Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer or similar.
* Strong mathematical and statistical modelling skills.
* Experience with time-series forecasting and machine learning, ideally applied to operational systems.
* Experience working in Python and with modern ML/optimization tooling and workflows.
* Solid Software Engineering fundamentals for deploying and maintaining ML systems in production.
* A pragmatic, product-oriented mindset: you optimize for real-world impact, not model complexity.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure).


**Nice to have**
* Experience with constrained optimization and applying it to real-world systems.
* Experience with energy systems or electricity market knowledge, especially flexibility and demand response.
* Experience with control system or physical systems modelling.


**What is in it for you?**
* Gain hands-on experience in a fast-growing scale-up, with a supportive and inclusive culture, and career advancement opportunities.
* Collaborate with diverse teams across international markets and launch products globally.
* Develop and grow personally and professionally in an entrepreneurial-minded environment.
* Thrive in a dynamic, solution-oriented culture, tackling challenges and driving meaningful solutions that make a positive impact on the world.
* Influence the company's success, with a visible impact on product development and market growth.


 At Aira, We’re not just champions of next-generation energy, we’re champions in Diversity and Inclusion too. We believe that a diverse workforce sparks innovation and creativity and enables us to better serve our customers and communities. We encourage individuals from all backgrounds, cultures, and perspectives to join our team. We will never accept any form of discrimination and believe that together, we can drive a new era for our people and planet.

title: Applied AI Engineer – Production
description:
Are you passionate about turning data into impactful solutions? Do you want to work hands-on with advanced AI/ML models in a high-tech manufacturing environment? At Silex, you will play a key role in transforming MEMS manufacturing through intelligent, data-driven solutions — improving quality, efficiency, and delivery performance. This is an opportunity to take ownership of end-to-end AI/ML development and make a real difference in a cutting-edge MEMS environment.
   

  

 Would you like to know more about Silex and what we do? Read more here.
   

  

**Team Production**
 You will be part of our Production team, where the main focus is to achieve our On-Time Delivery goals and make our process more efficient every day. The team consists of highly skilled and collaborative people focused on enabling smarter manufacturing and works cross-functionally with our process engineers, engineering, IT, and quality to improve processes, enhance yield, and support innovation. We are now expanding our Production team with two AI Applied Engineers to implement AI/ML to our manufacturing facility. In this role you will be part of shaping the future of AI-driven manufacturing at Silex.
   

  

**In this role, you will:**
* Drive AI/ML strategy and roadmap, including architecture, tools, and governance practices
* Develop and deploy end-to-end AI/ML solutions, from proof-of-concept to fully productionized systems
* Build and maintain robust pipelines for inference, monitoring, retraining, and version control
* Monitor, validate, and continuously improve deployed models in production environments
* Perform data-driven root cause analysis to identify and resolve process and quality issues
* Analyze production and equipment data to detect patterns and mitigate risks
* Support the organization with advanced data modeling and analytics for better decision-making


**We are looking for someone who has:**
* A Master’s or PhD in material science, physics, chemistry, data science, or a related field
* Experience in end-to-end AI & ML development, including deployment and monitoring in a production environment
* Programming skills in Python and experience with libraries such as scikit-learn, pandas, and NumPy
* Experience with experiment tracking and model management tools (e.g., MLflow or similar)
* Solid understanding of statistical analysis and ability to communicate insights clearly
* Familiarity with version control (Git) and deployment practices such as Docker and REST APIs
* Strong communication skills in English; Swedish is considered an advantage


**What we offer you:**
* The chance to work closely with fantastic colleagues.
* The opportunity to work with the latest technology in MEMS.
* To be part of a leading company driving technology development in the industry.
* Strong knowledge exchange with the world's foremost experts in process integration and process development of MEMS.


**About Silex**
 Silex is the world’s largest and most advanced pure-play MEMS foundry, headquartered in Stockholm. MEMS is present in nearly all modern technology, from personal gadgets to automotive electronics, medical monitoring and testing equipment, and thermal management systems. With a team of expert engineers, operators, technicians, support staff, specialists, and more, Silex brings the ideas and concepts of the industry’s leading MEMS innovators to life.
   

  

 The Silex team brings together talented, curious, visionary, and determined individuals to break new ground in the industry alongside customers, developing the latest process technology within MEMS for global applications. As part of this team, you will work with some of the world’s largest technology giants and innovation leaders in industries such as medicine, life sciences, consumer electronics, telecommunications, automotive, and industrial sectors.
   

  

**Additional Information**
 We have an ongoing recruitment process and therefore encourage you to submit your application as soon as possible. To apply, please attach your CV and answer a few questions. Our process is competency-based and includes a personality and logic test as well as reference checks. Additionally, we will conduct a background check and drug test prior to employment, and as an employer, we perform random alcohol and drug tests for all employees.
   

  

 We look forward to your application and to welcoming you on this exciting journey!
   

  

**Silex** 
 is the world’s largest and most advanced pure-play MEMS foundry. With a team of expert engineers, operators, technicians, engineers, support staff, specialists, and much more besides, Silex transforms the visionary ideas of the world’s leading MEMS innovators into reality.

title: Customer Success Manager
description:
As a Customer Success Manager at Upsales, you operate where revenue growth, technology, and long-term partnerships meet. Your mission is to ensure our customers not only use Upsales, but truly capitalize on it. You turn AI capabilities into measurable business outcomes. You drive expansion through trust, insight, and demonstrated value.
   

  

 Upsales is not just a CRM. We are Europe’s leading AI platform for B2B revenue acceleration. Founded in Stockholm, we empower ambitious B2B companies to predict better, prioritize smarter, and grow faster using AI. We are building the category leader in AI-powered revenue tech. Our culture is defined by ownership, craftsmanship, and an AI-first mindset.
   

  

 In this role, you combine commercial drive with technical depth. You act as both growth partner and trusted advisor. You understand data structures, integrations, and revenue workflows. You challenge customers strategically while guiding them operationally. Not just ensuring satisfaction, but driving transformation.
   

  

 This is long-term value creation. Expansion through impact. Growth built on expertise.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Own a portfolio of strategic customers with responsibility for adoption, value realization, retention, and expansion
* Develop a deep understanding of each customer’s revenue model, data maturity, tech stack, and growth ambitions
* Act as a technical and strategic advisor, guiding customers on best practices, integrations, AI capabilities, and advanced platform usage
* Identify expansion opportunities by connecting Upsales’ AI features to real commercial impact
* Lead executive dialogues, roadmap discussions, and quarterly business reviews
* Co-create success plans together with Solutions Engineers, Product, and Sales
* Translate complex product capabilities into clear business value
* Drive ARR growth through insight, trust, and demonstrated results
* Continuously elevate how we deliver customer value across the organization


**AI first mindset**
 We’re not looking for someone who simply uses AI. We want someone who weaponizes it. You treat tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI copilots as force multipliers, allowing you to deliver at a level and speed others can’t match. For you, AI isn’t an add-on, it’s the default operating system for how you think, work, and lead. You’re relentlessly curious about new capabilities, and you push the limits of what’s possible, turning AI into a competitive advantage for yourself, Upsales, and our customers. This is a role for someone with real ambition: someone who wants to set a new standard for efficiency, precision, and impact in the age of AI.
   

  

 Who We’re Looking For
   

  

* At least 5 years of experience in complex B2B sales, account management, or customer success with expansion responsibility
* A strong track record of driving revenue growth within existing accounts
* Comfortable discussing APIs, integrations, data models, and technical workflows with stakeholders across business and tech
* Experience working with fast-growing mid-sized B2B companies
* Commercially sharp with a consultative mindset
* Confident in executive conversations and long-term strategic planning
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 You are not looking for just another role. You are looking for momentum.
   

  

 Upsales is a bootstrapped company with big ambitions, known for our high-performing team, relentless curiosity, and a culture that challenges conventional thinking. From product to sales, we’re obsessed with creating real value for our customers and building software that actually moves the needle.

title: Backend Developer
description:
På Tele2 arbetar vi målmedvetet varje dag för att fortsätta vara ledande inom hållbarhet, vilket har lett till att vi blivit utnämnda klimatledare i Europa av Financial Times. Tele2 är också Sveriges mest hållbara företag och rankades 37:a globalt av Time Magazine och Statista på deras första lista över världens mest hållbara företag med 500 företag från över 30 länder. Vi fortsätter att uppnå nya mål och vi hjälper våra kunder att uppnå sina hållbarhetsmål eftersom vi åtagit oss att övergå till en cirkulär ekonomi.
   

  

 Our Values; Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficient.
   

  

*Are you a seasoned Java Developer passionate about building robust, scalable solutions that directly impact business success? We're looking for an engaged Senior Java Developer to take a key role, contributing to and shaping our critical core systems for Sales.*
**What You'll Do:**
 You'll design, develop, and maintain backend solutions that power our sales processes and streamline order fulfillment. This involves leading strategic projects, ensuring stability, and optimizing performance across the entire software development lifecycle. Your work will have a direct and measurable impact on our business.
   

  

**Who You Are:**
 You're an experienced Java Developer with several years of relevant experience building robust, scalable systems. You possess a proven ability to take significant ownership of technical solutions and are passionate about delivering high-quality code.
   

  

 We foster a culture of continuous improvement and agile methodologies. Therefore, we expect you to:
   

  

* Drive technical initiatives and design with a strong focus on quality and performance.
* Thrive in an agile environment where the team shares responsibility.
* Be driven by curiosity, staying updated with the latest Java ecosystem trends.
* Proactively monitor and improve service performance.


**Your Technical Expertise Likely Includes:**
 To succeed and thrive in this role, you have solid experience with:
   

  

* Backend & Language: Java (ideally Java 21), Spring Boot
* APIs & Messaging: REST APIs, Apache Kafka
* Build Tools: Maven
* Containerization & Orchestration: Docker, Kubernetes
* Database: MongoDB


 Meriting If you also have experience with some of the following:
   

  

* ReactJS, NodeJS, Typescript, or other relevant frontend technologies.


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Fullstack Engineer - Generative UI Platform
description:
UI Studio is Spotify’s internal generative UI prototyping platform that enables teams to spin up fully functioning replicas of Spotify surfaces — complete with playable music — to explore and pitch new product ideas. What started as a small internal project has evolved into a widely adopted platform, and we’re now expanding it into a full generative UI system where teams can prompt for the interfaces they need.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Fullstack Engineer who is strong across backend systems and confident building high-quality frontend experiences — to help scale the platform’s technical foundations and AI-native capabilities. You’ll play a meaningful role in shaping architecture, evolving core systems, and delivering reliable, developer-facing platform functionality used across Spotify.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design and deliver fullstack features that power UI Studio’s generative platform capabilities
* Architect and implement scalable services and user-facing workflows using TypeScript across frontend and backend (Node.js)
* Integrate LLM-powered coding agents into product workflows, including tool use, planning loops, evaluation loops, and multi-step orchestration
* Contribute to search and retrieval infrastructure, including vector-based search systems, indexing strategies, and relevance optimization
* Design, ship, and operate distributed systems deployed via containerized infrastructure such as Docker and Kubernetes
* Take end-to-end ownership of well-scoped systems and features, from technical design and implementation through deployment, monitoring, and operational support
* Improve internal APIs, platform primitives, and developer tooling to create intuitive and scalable platform experiences
* Uphold strong engineering standards through automated testing, observability, documentation, and continuous delivery practices


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have professional experience building production systems with TypeScript and Node.js, and you’re comfortable contributing across the full stack
* You have hands-on experience building or meaningfully integrating LLM-powered coding agents, including tool integrations and multi-step workflows
* You understand search and retrieval design patterns, such as vector search systems, Elasticsearch, and indexing strategies
* You have experience designing and operating distributed systems and deploying services using containerized tooling such as Docker and Kubernetes
* You demonstrate strong software engineering fundamentals and can independently ship well-scoped features end-to-end
* You think in systems — considering reliability, scalability, observability, and maintainability in your designs
* You communicate clearly in writing and produce structured, actionable technical documentation
* You care about developer experience and have experience building tools or platforms used by other engineers


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Java Backend Developer
description:
**Title: Java Backend Developer** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid)** 




**Employment Contract.** 




  





**Job Description:** 




**Mandatory skills\*** 




 o Experience in telecommunication domain.
 



 o technical expertise
 



 o Tech: Java, Spring Boot, JBoss Wild Fly, Apache Artemis, Apache Kafka, REST APIs, Event driven architecture
 



 o Database: MySQL, Amazon RDS, OpenSearch, Data Modeling, Query Optimization, Indexing
 



 o SRE: Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, Open Telemetry, Monitoring, Tracing, Alerting
 



 o IAM (Platform aligned): Azure Entra ID, Authentication, Authorization, RBAC, SSO
 



 o Traffic Layer: Apache HTTP Server, NGINX, Reverse Proxy, Load Balancing
 



  





**Desired skills\*** 




 • Proven experience in developing Java, Spring Boot
 



 • Familiar with latest trends in industry from technology and domain standpoint
 



 • Experience and good understanding of IT SDLC lifecycle phases. Through understanding Agile principles and practices
 



 • Strong business process/system analytical skills
 



 • Excellent oral and written communication skills with ability to interact with technical and functional staff at all levels.
 



 • Creative, innovative and able to work in a fast-paced environment
 



 • Team Player
 



 • Experience and desire to work in a Global delivery environment.

title: IAM Tekniker
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Vill du bygga säkra, smarta och hållbara identitetslösningar tillsammans med oss på Vivicta? Har du ett intresse för Identity & Access Management (IAM) – tekniker, standarder och produkter – och vill arbeta med lösningar inom till exempel stark autentisering, single sign‑on och federerade identiteter? Då kan detta vara nästa steg för dig.
   

  

 På Vivicta arbetar vi med samhällsviktiga kunder inom flera branscher och hjälper dem att skapa trygga och effektiva IT‑miljöer. Nu söker vi fler kollegor till vårt IAM team!
   

  

**När du börjar hos Vivicta som IAM Tekniker**
