title: Product Marketing Manager
description:
At Qred, we’re building the bank for small businesses. Since launching 10 years ago, we’ve grown from startup to profitable fintech scale-up, now generating over 1 billion SEK in annual revenue and supporting 50,000+ entrepreneurs across Northern Europe. We combine smart technology, real data, and human judgment to make financing simple, fast, and fair. With bold growth plans and strong momentum across multiple markets, we’re now looking for a Product Marketing Manager (PMM) for the next phase of growth.
   

  

****About The Role****
 As the Product Marketing Manager for our Cards division, you will act as the strategic architect between business goals and marketing execution. You will take full end-to-end ownership of our go-to-market success, transforming technical roadmaps into high-impact commercial strategies that drive long-term profitability. This mission is critical for scaling our card products while maintaining a precise focus on customer acquisition and unit economics.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Define Ideal Customer Profiles (ICP) and conduct deep market research to validate product requirements before engineering resources are committed.
* Architect the Go-to-Market narrative and product positioning, ensuring all commercial briefs provide clear direction on audience and expected acquisition costs.
* Orchestrate cross-channel strategy across Direct Mail, Digital, and Telemarketing to ensure a unified and frictionless customer journey.
* Translate customer pain points and market feedback into prioritized feature requests, aligning the technical roadmap with commercial P&L objectives.
* Optimize the "Lead-to-Active" funnel by utilizing web analytics and CRM data to refine lead-scoring logic and improve user experience flows.
* Accountable for customer segmentation and commercial proposition, providing operational guidance to RevOps and Marketing Specialists to enable scalable growth processes.


****Key Responsibilities****
 We are looking for a commercially-minded strategist who excels at driving alignment between technical, marketing, and sales teams. You should have a structured approach to problem-solving and a proven ability to build scalable frameworks in a fast-paced environment. Your motivation stems from seeing high-context strategies translate into measurable revenue growth and product adoption.
   

  

****Qualifications****
* Several years of experience in product marketing, growth, or commercial strategy within Fintech or a similar regulated industry.
* Proven track record of managing GTM strategies for complex financial systems or credit products.
* Strong proficiency in data-driven decision-making, specifically working with customer data and web analytics to optimize conversion funnels.
* Experience working with Credit Cards is preferred but not required.
* Academic background in Business, Economics, Engineering, or a related field.


**Why Qred?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, full ownership, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One Last Thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. While we encourage a hybrid setup, we do expect you to be at least three days per week at the office. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Business Development Representative
description:
**Business Development Representative (BDR) med sikte på Account Executive** 

*Reqtest | Stockholm | På plats* 




  





 Reqtest är Nordens ledande SaaS-plattform för kvalitetssäkring av digitaliseringsprojekt. Hos oss jobbar ett litet och fokuserat team med höga ambitioner och starkt engagemang. Bland våra totalt 200 kunder, i Sverige och internationellt, hittar du välkända varumärken såsom Lantmännen, Scania och Philips Healthcare. Reqtest är en del av Nordtech-gruppen som förvärvar och utvecklar framgångsrika mjukvarubolag. Efter ett starkt år går vi nu in i en spännande tillväxtfas, med fokus på både Sverige och nya marknader. Därför söker vi en ambitiös BDR som vill vara med och skala vår affär och bidra till nästa steg i vår resa.
   




**Om rollen** 

 Som BDR hos Reqtest är du spjutspetsen i vår tillväxt – och en central del i att bygga upp vår BDR-funktion inhouse och skala vår affär till nästa nivå. Du arbetar tätt tillsammans med vårt sälj- och marknadsteam för att identifiera rätt bolag, skapa kontakt med beslutsfattare och boka kvalificerade möten som leder till affär. Det är en roll med tydligt fokus, högt tempo och en naturlig språngbräda mot en Account Executive-roll för den som levererar.
 



  





 Vi tror på att bygga säljare inifrån. Du börjar med att bemästra mötesbokningen och prospekteringen, arbetar successivt in i kvalificering och med tiden får du större ansvar i hela säljprocessen. Från första samtal till avslut.
 



  





 Du arbetar nära vår CRO, CMO och Senior Sales Advisor i en platt organisation där feedback, transparens och samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.
 



  




**Ditt ansvar** 

 I denna roll är dina huvudsakliga ansvarsuppgifter att:
 


* Prospektera och identifiera rätt bolag och beslutsfattare med hjälp av traditionell research, AI, prospekteringsverktyg (Cognism och Clay) och LinkedIn Sales Navigator



  




* Driva outbound-kontakt via telefon, e-post och sociala kanaler — med ett personligt och välresearchat angreppssätt



  




* Boka och förbereda kvalificerade möten till seniora säljare, inklusive relevant kundinformation och affärskontext



  




* Arbeta strukturerat i Hubpsot, vårt CRM, för att bygga och hålla pipeline levande



  




* Utveckla och exekvera personanpassade outreach-sekvenser med stöd av Hubspot, AI och andra säljverktyg för öka antalet kvalitativa möten



  




* Delta i marknads- och säljaktiviteter, webinaruppföljningar och evenemang för att bygga relationer längs hela köpresan



  




* Aktivt förbättra vår säljprocess och användningen av olika verktyg för att automatisera processerna och förbättra våra möjligheter att skapa datadrivna säljstrategier och mäta resultat



  




* Successivt ta ett större ansvar i säljprocessen och utvecklas mot att driva affärer självständigt



  




**Vem vi söker** 

 Du är en naturlig kommunikatör som trivs med att skapa kontakt med nya människor och som inte backar för ett nej. Du är strukturerad, driven och motiveras av tydliga mål och mätbara resultat. Du är nyfiken på kund och affär, och du förstår att riktigt bra outbound handlar om relevans, timing och volym.
 



  





**Vi tror att du:** 




  




* Har 1–3 års erfarenhet av försäljning, outbound eller mötesbokning, gärna inom B2B eller IT



  




* Är orädd i telefon och bekväm i dialog med beslutsfattare på C-nivå



  




* Har ett strukturerat och disciplinerat arbetssätt och är van att jobba mot KPI:er



  




* Har erfarenhet av eller intresse för moderna säljverktyg som HubSpot, LinkedIn Sales Navigator och AI-drivna prospekteringsverktyg



  




* Är flytande i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift



  






 Meriterande:
 




  




* Erfarenhet av komplexa produkter eller tjänster, gärna inom IT eller SaaS



  




* Erfarenhet av CRM-system som HubSpot eller Salesforce



  




* Dokumenterade resultat från tidigare säljroller



  




* Kännedom om säljmetodiker som SPIN & MEDDPICC eller liknande



  




**Varför jobba med oss på Reqtest?** 

 Hos Reqtest blir du en del av en ambitiös och snabbväxande organisation där din utveckling står i fokus. Vi erbjuder en modern, datadriven säljmiljö med tydliga mål, rätt verktyg och ett team som pushar varandra framåt.
 



  





 Du får en strukturerad onboarding, kontinuerlig coaching och en tydlig karriärväg – för den som levererar finns möjligheten att växa in i en Account Executive-roll.
 



  





 Vi är ett mindre bolag med högt tempo och korta beslutsvägar, vilket ger dig möjlighet att påverka och utvecklas snabbt.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 



* Tydlig karriärväg mot Account Executive



  




* Konkurrenskraftig fast lön + provision



  




* Strukturerad onboarding och löpande coaching



  




* Modern, datadriven säljorganisation



  




* Tight teamkultur med högt tempo



  




* Centrala lokaler på Convendum, Vasastan



  




* Frukost, gym och en trivsam arbetsmiljö



  





**En inkluderande arbetsplats** 




 Vi strävar efter att skapa en inkluderande och öppen arbetsplats där olika perspektiv värdesätts. Hos oss bedöms alla kandidater utifrån kompetens och potential.
 



  




 Så ansöker du
 
 Ansökan sker endast via Teamtailor: https://careers.reqtest.com/jobs/7579437-business-development-representative-bdr-med-sikte-pa-account-executive

title: Data Science Lead
description:
**Mission**
 Neko Health exists to shift healthcare from treating illness to preventing it, using advanced, non‑invasive technology and clinical expertise to deliver early, actionable health insights.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 We are hiring a Data Science Lead to join our Data Science Team, working across projects such as Laser Speckle and other Optical Imaging. These roles involve taking novel sensor data streams and turning them into validated, production-ready algorithms with real clinical impact. You will collaborate with Hardware & Optics Engineers, Clinical Scientists, and other Data Scientists to develop prototypes, validate clinical use-cases, and deliver algorithms into production and integrated into Neko Health’s clinics and products.
   

  

**What You'll Deliver In The First 6–12 Months**
* Develop, verify, validate, and deploy physics-based algorithms for laser measurement systems, contributing to new product capabilities or research breakthroughs that improve member outcomes (Member-first, always).
* Collaborate cross-functionally with optical engineers, hardware developers, and clinical researchers to deliver algorithms that bridge the gap between physical sensor behaviour and production software within Neko Health's clinics and products (Tech-enabled, human-centred).
* Deliver production-quality code and integrate physics-aware algorithms into Neko's backend infrastructure, raising the bar for technical excellence across the Algorithm team (Chase 10X, not 10%).
* Design and execute calibration, validation, and noise characterisation methodologies for measurement algorithms, ensuring our science meets the highest standards of metrological and clinical rigour (Optimistic Truth Seeking).
* Mentor and collaborate within a high-performing, multidisciplinary team, contributing to a culture of openness and continuous improvement.


**Requirements**
* MSc or PhD in Physics, Optical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or a related field.
* 7+ years of relevant industry experience, or 5+ years post-PhD.
* Deep knowledge of physics-based modelling and simulation - translating physical systems (optical, acoustic, or electromagnetic) into code from first principles.
* Experience with laser-based measurement techniques such as laser speckle, doppler, OCT, interferometry, lidar FMCW, or spectroscopy or related fields.
* Strong software engineering skills and proven experience shipping algorithms to production.
* Experience working at the hardware–software boundary: characterising sensors, building calibration pipelines, and validating measurements against ground truth.
* Motivated to apply rigorous measurement science to improve preventative healthcare.


**Preferred**
* Experience working in clinical or regulated environments and an understanding of regulatory requirements for medical device algorithms.
* Prior experience in med-tech, biophotonics, metrology, or sensor-driven R&D where understanding the underlying physics was essential to getting the algorithm right.
* Demonstrated success mentoring engineers or researchers in high-growth, mission-driven organisations.


**About The Engineering Team**
**Distributed and Remote First**
 We are nearly 160 full time engineers at the company, working from Berlin, Chamonix, Hamburg, Lisbon, Marseille, Vilnius, and Stockholm, spanning diverse disciplines such as Hardware Engineering, Firmware Development, Electrical Design, Algorithm Development, Machine Learning Development, Optronics Research, Frontend Development and more. We don't expect people to join us with a specific tech knowledge, but we do expect you to work with our tools. We use a mix of React, Typescript, C++, and Python. Our APIs are written in C# with ASP.NET Core, uses Azure Cosmos DB, and Azure Active Directory for authentication.
   

  

 Our headquarters and our hardware development team are in Stockholm, Sweden.
   

  

 We are a
 **Remote First** 
 company; however, it is of course much easier to work remotely as a software engineer than a hardware or firmware engineer (since they require access to hardware or devices occasionally). Software engineers based in Stockholm work maybe one day a week or one day every two weeks from the office.
   

  

 We meet a couple of times per year to get to know each other and have fun.
   

  

**Organization and Way of Working**
 The engineering team is divided into smaller cross functional project teams that each focus on a specific goal or target, where some groups are long-lived, and some are short-lived, depending on how big the goal or deliverable is. We strive to create groups which are cross-functional and able to complete their goals without dependence on other teams, even though this is of course not always possible.
   

  

 Groups track goals on a yearly and quarterly basis with goal follow-up across the entire engineering organization on a bi-weekly basis. Most groups do internal planning on a bi-weekly basis, but in the end it's up to the group to decide how they want to work.
   

  

 We have, however, mandated that all groups must present their progress or failures or hacks at our bi-weekly engineering demo, a fun meeting/presentation where we talk about everything from short-circuiting power-modules, how hard it is to calibrate cameras or align polygons in space, to neat new command line tools for operations, a new auth mechanism in the backend, a cool new way to visualize health data or a new feature which helps our doctors be more productive.
   

  

 We have a flexible workplace that focuses on work/life balance, and we strongly believe in our mission but do not think that achieving it requires sacrificing everything else.
   

  

**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Informationssäkerhetschef (CISO)
description:
Vill du leda utvecklingen av Riksbankens arbete med informationssäkerhet? Är du en förändringsledare som vill lägga grunden till Riksbankens förstärkta informationssäkerhetsarbete?
   

  

**VI ERBJUDER DIG**
 Den 1 september 2026 sjösätts Riksbankens nya säkerhetsorganisation.
   

  

 Som en del i att forma och vidareutveckla ett verksamhetsnära säkerhetsarbete organiseras säkerhetsavdelningen i tre grupper: fysisk säkerhet, informationssäkerhet och personsäkerhet.
   

  

 I rollen som gruppchef för informationssäkerhet (CISO) leder du Riksbankens utvecklingsarbete för att stärka informationssäkerheten. Du får ett centralt ansvar för att sätta riktning, struktur och arbetssätt för informationssäkerhetsarbetet framåt – samtidigt som du bidrar till att forma den nya organisationen och dess samspel med verksamheten.
   

  

 Du får möjlighet att arbeta i en miljö där säkerhet är viktigt på riktigt med ansvar för centrala delar av det systematiska säkerhetsarbetet. Här får du möjlighet att påverka, utveckla och bygga ett starkt team i en samhällsviktig organisation.
   

  

**DET HÄR GÖR DU HOS OSS**
 Som informationssäkerhetschef tillhör du säkerhetsenheten och rapporterar till säkerhetschefen. Du ansvarar för att leda och utveckla Riksbankens informationssäkerhetsarbete inklusive övergripande kravställning inom it- och cybersäkerhet. Du är tillsammans med övriga deltagare i säkerhetschefens ledningsgrupp delaktig i arbetet med att styra, samordna, stödja och följa upp Riksbankens samlade säkerhets- och säkerhetsskyddsarbete.
   

  

 Som chef stödjer och utvecklar du medarbetare och verksamhet. Det innebär att du bygger team, delegerar ansvar, leder mot mål, inspirerar och ser till att det finns en god struktur för arbetet. Du arbetar strategiskt med att utveckla gruppens arbetssätt och processer samtidigt som du säkerställer att gruppen hanterar sitt operativa uppdrag på ett effektivt sätt. En viktig uppgift är att skapa välfungerande samarbeten med övriga enheter och avdelningar inom Riksbanken samt inom gruppen.
   

  

**DITT TEAM**
 Du leder en grupp med ca 6-9 medarbetare som bland annat arbetar med kravställning och stöd i informations- och cybersäkerhetsfrågor, genomför uppföljningar och informationsklassningar, håller säkerhetsutbildningar samt stödjer projekt med informationssäkerhetskompetens.
   

  

 Riksbanken består av totalt nio avdelningar. Säkerhetsenheten tillhör avdelningen för intern styrning och verksamhetsstöd. Här kan du läsa mer om hur Riksbankens organisation.
   

  

**MER OM DIG** 
 Vi söker dig som har en relevant akademisk utbildning alternativt annan relevant utbildning och arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig. Du har erfarenhet av arbete som chef med ansvar för verksamhet, budget och personalfrågor.
   

  

 Vidare har du erfarenhet av arbete med informationssäkerhet alt IT-säkerhet och erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Erfarenhet av att arbeta med ISO 27001 och annan relevant reglering som DORA och NIS är meriterande liksom arbete inom offentlig sektor och framför allt på statlig myndighet. Du har mycket god kunskap i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Du har erfarenhet av att utveckla team och driva förändringsarbete. Du är en relationsbyggare som förstår vikten av att skapa starka och hållbara samarbeten både inom teamet och med övriga delar av organisationen. Genom ditt ledarskap skapar du en kultur av tillit, öppen kommunikation och framåtblickande arbete där alla arbetar mot samma mål.
   

  

 Som person är du strukturerad, tydlig och beslutsför. Du planerar, organiserar och prioriterar arbetet på ett effektivt sätt vilket gör att du kan hantera en hög arbetsbelastning. Du är mål- och resultatorienterad samt tar stort ansvar för helheten. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

**MER OM TJÄNSTEN**
 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Anställningstyp: Tillsvidareanställning, Provanställning kan tillämpas,
   

  

 Placering: Stockholm Brunkebergs torg/Klarabergsgatan
   

  

 Arbetstid: Förtroendearbetstid
   

  

 Möjlighet att jobba distans: 1 eller 2 dagar i veckan
   

  

 Förmåner: Generösa semestervillkor, löneväxling till pension, subventionerad lunch, friskvårdsbidrag, subventionerad massage och tillgång till gym och ledarledda träningspass.
   

  

 Tjänsten kan komma att placeras i säkerhetsklass och en säkerhetsprövning innefattande registerkontroll, säkerhetsprövningssamtal och särskild personutredning görs då för slutkandidaten. För vissa tjänster ställs krav på svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

**ATT JOBBA PÅ RIKSBANKEN** 
 Riksbanken är en myndighet under riksdagen som arbetar på medborgarnas uppdrag för en stark och säker ekonomi. Som landets centralbank har vi en nyckelroll för individer, hushåll och företag i Sverige och i över 350 år har vi utforskat nya vägar för att vara i framkant – från kopparplåtmynt till AI. Oavsett inom vilket område din kompetens finns – är det med stolthet vi tar oss an våra uppdrag. Tillsammans arbetar vi för en låg och stabil inflation, bidrar till ett effektivt och stabilt finansiellt system och säkerställer att betalningar fungerar smidigt, även i kriser. Vi ger också ut Sveriges sedlar och mynt. Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Riksbanken här .
   

  

**ANSÖK**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Riksbanken med rekryteringsföretaget Human Capital. Deras rekryterare gör ett första urval i samråd med rekryterande chef samt utför intervjuer. De kandidater som går vidare träffar sedan rekryterande chef.
   

  

 Vi vill ha din ansökan med CV och personligt brev senast den 11 maj. Vi vill att du besvarar ett antal urvalsfrågor. På så vis kan du enkelt söka tjänsten och vi ges möjligheten att utvärdera våra kandidater på lika villkor. Logiska tester och arbetsprov ingår som en del av rekryteringsprocessen. Riksbanken genomför också bakgrundskontroller på slutkandidaterna, vilket innebär kontroll av examensbevis eller annat dokument som styrker din utbildning.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!
   

  

 Kontaktperson
   

  

 Rekryterande chef/Säkerhetschef
   

  

 Pär Rylander
   

  

 Rekryterare
   

  

 Hanna Looström 070-937 40 16 hanna.loostrom@humancapital.se
   

  

 Elnaz Adilipour, elnaz.adilipour@humancapital.se , 073-352 34 81 .

title: Sales Specialist
description:
**Join Telavox as a Sales Specialist (New Business) 🚀**
 Are you energized by outbound sales, building your own pipeline, and turning first conversations into long-term customer relationships?
   

  

 We’re expanding our sales team in Stockholm and are looking for a Sales Specialist focused on new customer acquisition within the SME and Mid-Market segments.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll own the entire new business journey: from identifying and prospecting your own accounts, to booking meetings, running value-based sales conversations, and closing deals. You’ll be part of an ambitious, supportive team that values curiosity, initiative, and leading by example while delivering results.
   

  

 If you enjoy proactively creating opportunities, influencing decisions, and driving a structured sales process from first contact to signed agreement, this could be your next step.
   

  

**About The Job**
 As a Sales Specialist, you’ll be a key contributor to our Stockholm sales team. Your main mission is to drive new customer acquisition within the SME/Mid-Market segment (20–350 employees) and guide customers from the very first outreach to a signed agreement. Every customer is different, with unique needs, expectations, and levels of complexity. You’ll work in a structured and data-driven way to prioritize accounts, identify opportunities, engage decision-makers, and create long-term value for your customers. Your approach will set the standard for how proactive and customer-focused sales can be done.
   

  

**In Your Day-to-day, You Will**
* Prospect and build your own pipeline within your target segment
* Seek out and qualify potential customers using calls, email, LinkedIn, and other digital channels
* Reach out to decision-makers and book your own meetings
* Drive the entire sales process from first contact to signed agreement
* Work in a structured, data-driven way using modern CRM tools – we use HubSpot
* Deliver value-based sales conversations that solve real customer challenges
* Act as a trusted advisor, guiding customers through decisions and demonstrating best practices


 Once a deal is signed, you’ll hand over the customer to our Customer Success team, ensuring a smooth implementation and long-term value throughout the partnership. You’ll be selling one of the most competitive communication platforms in the telecom market, helping businesses simplify how they communicate and collaborate every day.
   

  

 You’ll be part of our Stockholm sales team, working closely with colleagues who also drive outbound sales, share best practices, and push each other to reach the next level.
   

  

**About You**
 You enjoy proactively creating new business opportunities and building relationships from the very first conversation. You’re curious, motivated by results, and comfortable owning clear activity and revenue targets.
   

  

 You likely have a few years of experience in outbound sales or business development, where taking ownership, guiding processes, and setting an example for others are part of your everyday work.
   

  

**You’ll thrive in this role if you’re motivated by:**
* Proactively seeking out new opportunities and turning them into business
* Building strong relationships with customers and colleagues
* Guiding customers through decisions and adding long-term value
* Understanding customer challenges and solving them with the right technology
* Working in a structured, data-driven sales environment


**Key skills and experience:**
* A few years of experience in outbound sales or business development
* Experience in proactively contacting and engaging potential customers
* Strong communication skills in both Swedish and English
* Experience working with CRM systems in a structured and data-driven way – HubSpot is a plus


**Good To Have**
* Experience within Telecom, SaaS, or IT
* Experience selling solutions to SME or Mid-Market organizations


 As a person, you’re curious, driven, and eager to continuously learn new things. You enjoy building relationships both internally and externally, take ownership of your work, and naturally influence and guide others around you. You believe that having fun at work is a key part of achieving great results.
   

  

 At Telavox, we value new perspectives and positive energy, and we’re excited to continue growing our team with people who share that mindset.
   

  

****Join us at Telavox 💚****
 Since Telavox's journey started in 2002, we have strengthened our position as the leading forward-thinking communication platform for businesses. As a digital mobile operator, we develop and own our all-in-one communication platform, which integrates telephony, PBX, messaging, meetings, and contact centers, giving businesses a smarter way to connect.
   

  

 Today, we’re a thriving company with 1.9 billion SEK in revenue and 500+ Telavoxers across nine countries. We embrace AI and automation to push the boundaries of business communication.
   

  

 We offer flexible work options and adaptable hours, giving you the freedom to balance life and career while staying connected to our vibrant Telavox culture.
   

  

 Read more about our new HQ in Malmö 🏠!
   

  

**How to apply!**
 At Telavox, we don't focus on fitting in; we focus on making room for everyone.
   

  

 We’re always on the lookout for great talent, so applications are reviewed continuously. If you're ready to be part of an innovative, AI-driven telecom company, apply today with your CV and cover letter in English.
   

  

 For any questions, feel free to reach out to Talent Acquisition Partner Ami Faraguna at ann-marie.faraguna@telavox.com or Hiring Manager Marcus Johansson marcus.johansson@telavox.com.
   

  

**Learn more about what we do! ⬇️**
 Telavox develops world-leading communications platforms with solutions for smart and efficient telephony, PBX, chat and much more. Regardless of whether it involves an entrepreneur-driven startup or a giant among giants, Telavox contributes to making companies more transparent, efficient and accessible.

title: Business Manager – Microsoft (f/m/x)
description:
Sii Sweden is expanding its Microsoft offering and is looking for an experienced Business Development Manager to drive growth within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, with a strong focus on Copilot and Power Platform.
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for identifying and developing new business opportunities, building a strong sales pipeline, and driving end-to-end sales processes in the Swedish market. You will work closely with customers to understand their business needs and position Microsoft-based solutions that deliver real business value.
   

  

 You will collaborate with technical experts and delivery teams to shape competitive offerings and build long-term relationships with clients, partners, and Microsoft representatives.
   

  

****Your tasks****
* Identify and develop new business opportunities in the M365 area (Copilot, Microsoft Power Platform).
* Build and manage a strong sales pipeline
* Understand customer needs and develop solutions that leverage the full capabilities of the M365 platform, including Copilot, Power Platform, and Power BI
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and Microsoft representatives
* Stay up to date with the latest developments and trends in the M365 ecosystem
* Cooperate with technical experts to shape competitive offerings on Microsoft-based solutions
* Develop and implement strategic plans to achieve sales targets and expand the customer base
* Drive end‑to‑end sales processes: from lead generation to contract closure
* Provide feedback to the product development team on market needs and opportunities


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, IT, or a related field
* Proven experience in business development, sales, or a similar role, preferably within the IT or technology sector
* Understanding of the M365 ecosystem and its application in solving business problems
* Previous cooperation with Microsoft would be an advantage
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
* Ability to translate technical solutions into business value for non-technical stakeholders
* Analytical and problem-solving skills
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment
* Willingness to travel as required
* Proficiency in Swedish & English


 Job no. 260331-CXOS4
   

  

 Sii ensures that all hiring decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications and competence. We are committed to equal and fair treatment of all, regardless of legally protected characteristics. At Sii, we promote a diverse and inclusive work environment, in full compliance with applicable anti-discrimination laws.
   

  

**Benefits For You**
 Solid financial situation
   

  

 Many experts you can learn from
   

  

 Contracts with the biggest brands
   

  

 Refferals program
   

  

 Mentoring program
   

  

 14 authentic core values
   

  

 Inclusive culture based on dialogue
   

  

 Regular integration events and trips
   

  

 Passion Sponsorship Program
   

  

 Open and accessible management team
   

  

 Profit sharing
   

  

 Welcome packs & occasional gifts

title: Projektledare - Tillverkning & Industrialisering
description:
Är du passionerad när det gäller att driva perfektion inom tillverkning och leda industrialiseringsprojekt från koncept till fullskalig produktion? Vi söker en skicklig och resultatinriktad
 **Projektledare – Tillverkning & Industrialisering** 
 till vårt team på System 3R International AB.
 



  





**Om rollen** 




 Du kommer att leda fördefinierade projekt inom tillverkning och industrialisering. Du ansvarar för att hantera tidsplaner, budgetar, resurser och tvärfunktionella team för att optimera processer, säkerställa kvalitet och öka produktiviteten. Rollen omfattar allt från att säkerställa en effektiv övergång från produktutveckling till skalbar produktion i full skala med hög kvalitet, till olika förbättringsprojekt inom tillverkningsprocessen. Du tillhör Produktionstekniska avdelningen som idag är ett team på 11 medarbetare.
 



  





**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter** 



* Leda tvärfunktionella projekt inom tillverkning och industrialisering
* Utveckla detaljerade projektplaner i linje med definierade mål
* Hantera intressenter och fungera som central kontaktpunkt för kommunikation
* Leverera projekt i tid och inom budget
* Säkerställa att kvalitetsstandarder och prestationsmål uppfylls
* Stödja produktionsteam genom utbildning och initiativ för kontinuerliga förbättringar
* Slutföra dokumentation och genomföra projektutvärderingar vid projektavslut



  





**Typiska mål** 



* Möjliggöra effektiv introduktion av nya produkter (NPI)
* Öka produktiviteten i tillverkningen
* Minska kostnader och operativt slöseri
* Förbättra processernas stabilitet



  





**Utbildning** 



* Kandidatexamen eller högre inom maskinteknik eller relevant tekniskt område



  





**Erfarenhet** 



* Erfarenhet av utveckling av tillverkningsprocesser eller industrialisering
* Erfarenhet av projektledning, inklusive planering och riskhantering
* Teknisk förståelse för relevanta tillverkningsprocesser



  





**Språk** 



* Flytande i engelska och svenska (tal och skrift)
* Tyska ses som meriterande



  





**IT-kunskaper** 



* Microsoft Office
* SAP



  





**Vem du är** 



* Kommunikativ förmåga och vana att samordna och samarbeta, både internt och externt.
* Analytisk och lösningsorienterad
* Erfaren av att leda tvärfunktionella team
* Strukturerad, resultatinriktad och kvalitetsfokuserad



  





 Om du är redo att ta ansvar för industrialiseringsprojekt och bidra till högsta kvalité inom tillverkning ser vi fram emot din ansökan.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 System 3R International AB utvecklar och tillverkar utrustning för ökad produktivitet inom serieproduktion och verktygstillverkning – ett område där vi är världsledande. Konceptet omfattar allt från palett-/referenssystem & robotar till mjukvarusystem för produktionsplanering och automatisering. Produktutveckling och produktion sker främst i Sverige. Marknadsföring och försäljning sker via koncernen United Machining Solutions säljbolag i Europa, USA samt Asien. Exportandelen uppgår till 95%. System 3R International AB omsätter ca 500 Mkr och har ca 180 anställda.
 



  





**Övrig information** 




 Vi erbjuder flexibla arbetstider genom flextid, vilket ger dig möjlighet att anpassa din arbetsdag inom ramen för verksamhetens behov och därigenom skapa en god balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Tjänsten är en visstidsanställning som övergår till en tillsvidareanställning efter 6 månader med en fast månadslön som sätts utifrån din kompetens, erfarenhet och rollens ansvar.
 



  





 Utöver grundlönen omfattas anställningen av ersättningar och förmåner enligt
 **Teknikavtalet** 
 , det kollektivavtal som vi är anslutna till. Detta innebär bland annat reglerade villkor för arbetstid, övertidsersättning, semester, pension, försäkringar och andra anställningsvillkor. Genom kollektivavtalet säkerställs trygga och tydliga arbetsvillkor samt ett omfattande skydd för dig som anställd.

title: M&A Manager - Technology & Product Due Diligence
description:
*BearingPoint Capital is seeking a Manager to join our growing M&A team in Stockholm, working across both Technology Due Diligence and Product Due Diligence.* 




  





*As part of BearingPoint Capital, you will have the opportunity to fast-track your career in a start-up-like environment within a large organisation, gaining competencies and skills through a wide variety of challenging M&A projects for top-tier clients. Our client base includes leading Private Equity firms, family offices, corporates, and strategic investors across the region.* 




  





*Our M&A service offerings are designed for companies where technology is central to the business strategy and investment thesis. You will join a highly skilled and collaborative team in the Nordics, working on local and cross-border engagements. We are looking for high-performing candidates with a passion for technology and software to support our clients across technology and product due diligence.* 




  





**About BearingPoint Capital** 




 BearingPoint Capital is a business unit within the global management consultancy BearingPoint. Capital is a global team that delivers M&A advisory services on both the sell-side and buy-side in transactions. Our service offerings include M&A strategy consulting, commercial and technological due diligence.
 



  





 BearingPoint Capital draws on BearingPoint’s global consultancy network, with more than 6,500 employees helping leading companies in more than 75 countries achieve measurable and lasting success.
 



  





**In This Role, You Will Be Involved In** 



* Technology Due Diligence Execution: Lead buy- and sell-side technology due diligence engagements. This includes evaluating tech strategy and roadmaps, architecture, infrastructure, and organisational capabilities to assess technology maturity, scalability, and alignment with business objectives.
* Product Due Diligence: Lead the assessment of product strategy, roadmap, and functional/feature differentiation as part of broader due diligence engagements, helping clients understand product maturity (versus competitors) and alignment with business goals.
* Tech Financial Advisory: Support clients with input on IT financials, including detailed analysis of operating and capital expenditures (Opex/Capex), synergy modelling, IT carve-out costing, benchmarking, and cost estimation. Help clients understand the financial implications of technology decisions in the context of M&A.
* Sales: Drive sales initiatives in the Nordic Private Equity and Corporate deals market.
* Proposal & Pitch Development: Collaborate with senior team members to develop tailored proposals and sales pitches for prospective clients. This includes identifying client needs, shaping engagement approaches, and articulating the value of BearingPoint Capital’s advisory services.
* Practice Development & Mentoring: Play an active role in developing the M&A practice by refining methodologies, tools, and knowledge assets. Mentor junior team members, providing guidance and feedback to support their professional growth and ensure high-quality delivery.
* Cross-Border Collaboration: Work closely with colleagues across Europe on engagements spanning multiple industries and geographies. Leverage the firm’s international network to bring diverse perspectives and best practices to client projects.



  





**We are looking for top-performing individuals with the following characteristics and background:** 



* 6+ years of relevant experience in M&A advisory; or 6+ years in a technology company, PE-backed business, or in-house tech strategy role
* Proven experience leading buy- and sell-side TDD and/or PDD workstreams in fast-paced, client-facing settings.
* Experience with driving sales initiatives.
* Strong analytical skills spanning both IT financials (Opex/Capex analysis, synergy modelling, carve-out costing, benchmarking) and product/tech fundamentals (SaaS metrics, software architecture, build-vs-buy trade-offs, technical debt assessment).
* Business-oriented mindset with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver results under pressure.
* Collaborative team player with experience mentoring junior colleagues and contributing to a supportive team culture.
* Excellent communication skills, with a track record of producing high-quality reports and client presentations.
* MBA or Master’s degree from a leading university, with a strong academic record.
* Candidate must have the right to work in Sweden and be fluent in Swedish; English proficiency is equally required as our primary working language.



  





**For The Right Candidate, We Can Offer** 



* A fast, visible path to Sr. Manager within a small, tight-knit Nordic team where your contributions shape the practice and progression is based on impact, not tenure.
* Access to one of Europe’s most active technology M&A market.
* Exposure to the full breadth of our Technology and Product Due Diligence work, from evaluating IT infrastructure and architecture to assessing product maturity, market fit, and competitive differentiation.
* Collaboration with top-tier clients, including leading Private Equity firms, family offices, and strategic investors.
* Highly competent and down-to-earth colleagues.
* An informal and “easy to work with” culture.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.
* Stockholm city-centre office.



  





**Our Application Process** 




 Upload your CV, cover letter, and academic transcripts from higher education in our system. We review applications on a rolling basis and will invite qualified candidates to interview as soon as possible.
 



  





 During the interview process, you will meet various colleagues from the team and conduct case interviews.

title: DevOps/DevSecOps Engineer
description:

title: Testledare HR transformation
description:
Vi söker en erfaren testledare till ett omfattande HR-transformationsprogram hos en större nordisk organisation. Uppdraget innebär att vara en nyckelperson i implementeringen av SAP SuccessFactors samt bidra till att etablera en modern, enhetlig och skalbar HR-plattform. Programmet omfattar både systemimplementation, harmonisering av HR-processer och etablering av ett nytt framtida arbetssätt (Delivery Model).
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning / arbetsuppgifter**
 Som Testledare Ansvarar Du För Hela Testområdet Inom Programmet Och Arbetar Nära Både Verksamhet Och IT. Dina Huvudsakliga Arbetsuppgifter Inkluderar
   

  

* Ta fram och förvalta teststrategi samt testplan
* Planera, koordinera och leda testaktiviteter inom:
+ Datamigrering
+ Systemtest
+ Integrationstest
+ User Acceptance Test (UAT)

* Samordna tester över flera områden: system, integrationer, processer och data
* Ansvara för defekthantering och kvalitetssäkring
* Säkerställa struktur och framdrift i testarbetet
* Rapportera status, risker och framsteg till programledning och styrgrupp
* Samarbeta med HR, IT, implementationsteam samt externa partners


**Skallkrav**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av testledning inom HCM-implementationer
* Erfarenhet från större transformations- eller förändringsprogram
* Mycket god förmåga att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt
* Flytande engelska samt minst ett skandinaviskt språk


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av SAP SuccessFactors
* Erfarenhet av testning i komplexa integrationslandskap
* Erfarenhet av datamigreringsprojekt


**Personliga egenskaper**
* Strukturerad och metodisk med stark leveransförmåga
* Kommunikativ och van att hantera många intressenter
* Proaktiv och lösningsorienterad
* God samarbetsförmåga och förmåga att skapa förtroende i tvärfunktionella team
* Förmåga att arbeta i en föränderlig miljö med högt tempo


**Start, slut, omfattning och plats**
**Start:** 
 Omgående
   

  

**Slut:** 
 28 februari 2027
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Deltid fram till sommaren 2026, därefter heltid (uppehåll i juli 2026)
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Hägersten, Stockholm (ca 3 dagar/vecka på plats, viss möjlighet till distansarbete)

title: QA Analytical Specialist
description:
****Company Description****
***Statistics show that women and underrepresented groups tend to apply to jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Sobi encourages you to change that statistic and apply. Rarely do candidates meet 100% of the qualifications. We look forward to your application!***
 At Sobi, the work we do every day redefines the standards of care and transform the lives of people living with rare diseases.
   

  

 As a diverse team of entrepreneurial people, we are passionate about our growth journey towards becoming a global leader, making a difference for rare disease patients, moving quickly and always challenging the status quo.
   

  

 We are committed to an inclusive, sustainable and flexible workplace that fosters growth and development.
   

  

****Job Description****
**About the role**
 Global Quality plays a key role in making sure our medicines meet internal standards, regulatory expectations, and the commitments in our registration files. As an independent quality organisation, we bring the expertise to deliver on these commitments—while continuously strengthening our capabilities, developing our people, and evolving our quality system to support the business as we grow.
   

  

 As QA Analytical Specialist, you’ll be the quality partner for analytical activities and stability studies for products where Sobi is the MAH. You’ll ensure GMP-compliant methods and data support reliable release and stability testing for both clinical and commercial supply—working closely with internal stakeholders and external partners to keep quality, compliance, and patient impact at the centre of everything we do.
   

  

 It is a Hybrid role and can be based in either Stockholm or Basel, reporting to Head of Quality Product Lifecycle & Clinical Supply.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
* Coordinator and Quality approver for deviations, CAPA and change controls.
* QA-approver for GMP-related analytical activities, e.g. validation and technology transfer of analytical methods used for in-process control, release and stability studies.
* Performance of quality evaluation of CLOs.
* QA contact for CLOs
* Provide Quality Assurance for stability studies for products where Sobi is the MAH, including approving plans and protocols.
* Perform QA review and approval of extension of expiry date of critical analytical material, including but not limited to reference standards and control samples.
* Perform QA review and approval of product specifications.
* Give support to Global Regulatory Affairs / CMC in analytical quality issues for variations and market expansions.
* Act as a representative of Global Quality and provide QA analytical guidance to support projects in order to ensure compliance with GMP
* Manage Quality Technical Agreements with CLOs.
* Author, review and approve SOPs and related documentation related to the position.


****Qualifications****
**About you**
 You’re a quality-minded analytical professional who enjoys working cross-functionally, taking ownership, and bringing structure to complex scientific work. You combine strong GMP understanding with a collaborative mindset, and you’re motivated by the opportunity to help deliver reliable, high-quality medicines to patients who need them most.
   

  

****Qualifications****
* University degree in Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology, Pharmaceutical Science, or similar.
* 5+ years’ experience in GMP analytical work within pharma/biotech—covering analytical method development and validation, product specifications, deviation investigations, and change control; ideally in QA supporting QC (or as a QC Coordinator/similar).
* Broad knowledge of analytical chemistry and bioassays, including clear and compliant documentation practices.
* Professional proficiency in English, written and spoken.
* You live the Sobi CARE values: Care, Ambition, Urgency, Ownership and Partnership.
* Ability to work independently, take initiative, and make sound quality decisions.
* Strong communication skills and a collaborative, team-oriented approach.
* A structured mindset with attention to detail and a commitment to continuous improvement.


 Here at Sobi we live by our core values: Care, Ambition, Urgency, Ownership and Partnership!
   

  

****Additional Information****
**How to apply**
 We have an ongoing selection process in this recruitment and ask you to send your application as soon as possible. Click apply and include your resume in English.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 Here At Sobi, Our Mission And Culture Get Us Excited To Come To Work Every Day, But Here Are a Few More Reasons To Join Our Team:
   

  

* Emphasis on work/life balance
* Collaborative and team-oriented environment
* Opportunities for professional growth
* Diversity and Inclusion
* Competitive compensation for your work
* Making a positive impact to help ultra-rare disease patients who are in need of life saving treatments


 We are a global company with over 1,900 employees in more than 30 countries and are committed to the societies where we operate. With a deeply skilled management team directing our day-to-day wins, and a Board with a stellar track record, we’re ready to take on the world’s diseases, ailments and adversity. Our people believe they have the power to make a positive impact in others’ lives because that’s exactly what we do here. If you’re seeking a career that taps into your talents in a way that makes the world a better, healthier place, we just may have a job for you.
   

  

 We know our employees are our most valuable asset, and our culture conveys that. We offer a competitive benefits package, to support the health and happiness of our staff.
   

  

**Sobi Culture**
 At Sobi, we refuse to accept the status quo. This is because we have witnessed first-hand the challenges facing those affected by rare diseases and have used this knowledge to shape our business to find new ways of helping them.
   

  

 As a specialized biopharmaceutical company, we are dedicated to rare diseases. And we see this focus as a strength. By effectively turning our research into ground-breaking treatments, we help make medicine more accessible and open up more possibilities for patients and more opportunities for those caring for them. This has been our approach since day one, but we know we can’t change the world of rare diseases on our own. Accomplishing this requires strong partnerships with patients, partners and stakeholders across the entire value chain. Together, we define how our business can create solutions that serve the needs of those affected by rare diseases while facilitating sustainable growth.

title: Systemutvecklare SAP ABAP till Avtalat
description:
**Vill du arbeta med modern SAP-utveckling i en organisation med ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag? Hos Avtalat får du vara med och utveckla lösningar som påverkar miljontals människors ekonomiska trygghet. Just nu befinner vi oss i en spännande förändringsresa där vi bygger framtidens plattform genom att slå ihop två separata SAP-miljöer, S4 och S4i.** 



  





  

 Din roll
 
 Som systemutvecklare inom SAP ABAP blir du en del av ett agilt team som ansvarar för ett av Avtalats applikationsområden. Teamet består av utvecklare, kravanalytiker och testare som tillsammans utvecklar och förvaltar våra tjänster.
 


  


 Du arbetar i ett modernt agilt arbetssätt med sprintar och programplanering inspirerad av SAFe, där samarbete och kontinuerlig utveckling står i fokus. I rollen får du möjlighet att arbeta både strategiskt och operativt i vår resa mot en gemensam plattform, S4i.
 


  


**Som Systemutvecklare SAP ABAP kommer du att:** 



  

* Designa, modellera och utveckla lösningar i SAP ABAP och Fiori
* Arbeta med datamodellering och utveckling av tjänster, inklusive CDS och OData
* Samarbeta nära ditt team och andra team inom organisationen
* Bidra till förbättringar, lösningsförslag och tekniska vägval
* Aktivt bidra till din egen och teamets kompetensutveckling


  

  

**Kvalifikationer**

 Vi söker dig som är en erfaren SAP-utvecklare med ett genuint intresse för utveckling inom ABAP och SAP RAP. Du har lätt för att sätta dig in i befintliga system och förstår hur olika delar hänger ihop, samtidigt som du har förmågan att själv identifiera förbättringar och föreslå nya lösningar. Du arbetar strukturerat och med hög kvalitet, och har ett analytiskt och logiskt förhållningssätt till problemlösning.
 


  


 Som person är du noggrann och kvalitetsmedveten, med ett driv att leverera bra resultat. Du är också en prestigelös lagspelare som trivs med att samarbeta och bidra till ett positivt teamklimat. Vi ser dessutom att du är nyfiken på att utvecklas vidare inom exempelvis S4i och AI.
 


  


**Kvalifikationer:** 



  

* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av objektorienterad utveckling i SAP ABAP
* Erfarenhet av SAP RAP och SAP Fiori
* God kunskap i CDS och kan skriva komplexa CDS-entiteter och använda dem som bas till RAP-objekt
* Erfarenhet av OData-tjänster (via RAP och gateway)
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* Möjlighet att arbeta på plats i Stockholm minst tre dagar i veckan


  


**Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:** 



  

* Ha arbetat inom bank/försäkring
* Erfarenhet från AI och/eller intresse av att arbeta med Joule/ GitHub Co-pilot
* Utveckling i Java /Javascript
* SAP S4i
* SAP BTP
* SAP RISE
* CRM
* DevOps
* ADO


  

 Vårt erbjudande
 
 Vi erbjuder dig möjligheten att vara med på en unik och spännande resa i en organisation där kundfokus, samarbete och en stark gemensam drivkraft står i centrum för vårt samhällsviktiga uppdrag.
 


  


 Avtalat befinner sig i en intensiv och utvecklande fas där de närmaste åren kommer andas nybyggaranda även om vi har en stabil grund att stå på. Vi har samlat kunskap och kompetens från tre bolag, Avtalat, Collectum och Fora för att forma vår nya framtid och gemensamt skapa värde för våra närmare fem miljoner kunder.
 


  


 Hos oss präglas vardagen av ett öppet klimat, hög kompetens och en gemensam vilja att nå framgång – tillsammans.
 


  


  

**Plats** 
 : Olof Palmes gata 31, Stockholm
 **Omfattning** 
 : Heltid
 


  


  

 Vi använder oss av tester som ett komplement i rekryteringsprocessen. Vi tillämpar
   

 6 månaders provanställning.
   




  





  


**Facklig kontaktperson** 



  


 Thomas Bill, Unionen Telefon: 070-646 56 96

title: Senior Delivery Consultant - Cloud Architect
description:
**Description**
 The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Delivery Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the project lifecycle.
   

  

 Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Delivery Consultant you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of each customer. You’ll work closely with stakeholders to gather requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and managing risks throughout the project.
   

  

* This role requires you to be a Swedish National and have business level proficiency in the Swedish language


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:
   

  

* Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to customer needs
* Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project delivery
* Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective migration strategies
* Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging technologies
* Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating reusable artifacts


 A day in the life
   

  

 The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of solutions, technologies, and industries.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Diverse Experiences
   

  

 Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
   

  

 Why AWS
   

  

 Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5 + Experience in cloud architecture and implementation
* 5 + years Hands-on experience leading the design, development and deployment of enterprise solution and deep technical expertise and consulting acumen to effectively guide customers through their AWS cloud transformation journey.
* Current hands-on technology infrastructure, network, compute, storage, and virtualization experience
* Customer facing skills to represent AWS well and drive discussions with senior personnel regarding trade-offs, best practices, project management and risk mitigation


**Preferred Qualifications**
* AWS experience preferred, with proficiency in a wide range of AWS services (e.g., EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation)
* AWS Professional level certifications (e.g., Solutions Architect Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) preferred
* Experience with automation and scripting (e.g., Terraform, Python)
* Knowledge of security and compliance standards (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR)
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Experience with software development life cycle (SDLC) and agile/iterative methodologies
* Presentation Competency for leading technical workshops and customer presentations


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch) - G54
   

  

 Job ID: A10396278

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.**
 At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead** 
 who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.
   

  

 As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities


**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.
   

  

**You also have:**
* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


**Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Sophiahemmet söker redovisningsansvarig
description:
**Vill du ta ett helhetsansvar för redovisning i en organisation där samhällsnytta, utveckling och kvalitet står i centrum?**




 Vi söker en redovisningsansvarig med gedigen erfarenhet och ett genuint intresse för redovisningsfrågor. Hos oss får du en nyckelroll med övergripande ansvar för redovisningen inom våra verksamheter – sjukhus, högskola och fastighet
   

  





**Beskrivning**




 Som redovisningsansvarig har du ett helhetsansvar för redovisningen i koncernen och tillhörande stiftelser. Du rör dig tryggt mellan detaljnivå och strategiskt perspektiv, med fokus på kvalitet, effektivitet och affärsnytta. Arbetet är självständigt samtidigt som du arbetar i nära samverkan med dina kollegor.
   

  





 Hos oss får du möjlighet att bli en viktig drivkraft i både redovisningsfunktionen och ekonomiavdelningen fortsatta utvecklingsarbete. Inte minst inom digitalisering och AI-utveckling som är prioriterade områden på Sophiahemmet.
   

  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Övergripande ansvar för redovisningen i koncernens tre bolag och anknutna stiftelser
* Upprätta interna och externa bokslut enligt gällande lagar och regelverk
* Ansvara för revisionsprocessen
* Löpande redovisning
* Stötta, samordna och utveckla redovisningsteamet
* Kontakter med revisorer, bank, Skatteverket och andra myndigheter
* Digitalisera och effektivisera ekonomiavdelningens arbetssätt
* Arbeta proaktivt med ekonomisk analys och bidra till organisationens fortsatta utveckling



**Kvalifikationer**




 Vi tror att du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och trivs i en bred roll där du får ta ansvar. Du har lätt för att samarbeta, gillar att utveckla arbetssätt och ser hur god redovisning skapar verklig affärs- och verksamhetsnytta.
   

  





**Vi söker dig som har:** 



* Akademisk utbildning inom ekonomi
* Dokumenterat goda kunskaper inom redovisning
* God IT-mognad och ett starkt intresse för digital utveckling
* Goda kunskaper i Excel
* Flytande i svenska både i tal och skrift
* Erfarenhet av redovisning för ideella föreningar och stiftelser är meriterande.



**Varför Sophiahemmet**




 Hos oss arbetar du i fräscha, nyrenoverade lokaler tillsammans med Sophiahemmets övriga stabsfunktioner. Vi erbjuder ett omväxlande och utvecklande arbete i en organisation med tydligt samhällsuppdrag.
   

  





 Vi värnar om en sund arbetsmiljö och erbjuder bland annat:
 


* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Rikskort
* Sjuk- och hälsoförsäkring
* Koncerngemensamma aktiviteter



 Läs mer om hur det är att arbeta på Sophiahemmet Jobba hos oss
   

  





 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med sex månaders provanställning
   

  





 Intresserad? Sök redan idag dock senast 10 maj. 
   

  





 Sophiahemmet ideell förening bedriver sjukvård, utbildning och forskning i nära samverkan sedan 1884. Inom Sophiahemmet AB, ett helägt dotterbolag till Sophiahemmet, ideell förening, ingår Sophiahemmet Sjukhus som bedriver högkvalitativ specialistvård i samverkan mellan ett trettiotal självständiga vårdgivare. Därutöver ingår även Sophiahemmets verksamhetsområde fastighet med uppdrag att ansvara för drift och utveckling av sjukhusets fastigheter och tjänster till områdets hyresgäster. Sophiahemmet Högskola är en ledande aktör inom utbildning och forskning för framtidens hälsa, vård och omsorg. Högskolan erbjuder utbildning på grundnivå, avancerad nivå och forskarnivå. Mer information hittar du på www.sophiahemmet.se.

title: Design and Engineering Tools Deployment Lead NB Zone
description:
We are looking for a Design and Engineering Deployment Lead – Design and Build software – Nordic Baltic Zone to manage the rollout and adoption of our software solutions across the Nordic Baltic region. Schneider Electric has a wide cutting-edge portfolio of software, tools and configurators to support the design, optimization and building processes of our customers and partners.
   

  

 In this role, you will work closely with internal sales teams, design offices, panel builders, system integrators and contractors. You will play a key part in defining, deploying, and training our partners on our software tools within electrical distribution, building systems, and related solutions.
   

  

 This is an excellent opportunity for someone who enjoys working in an international environment, understands design and build processes, and can form a strong overall picture of both technical and business needs. The role is also suitable for early career candidates with strong motivation to learn and grow.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Software Definition & Deployment**
* Manage the rollout of software tools within the Nordic organization.
* Understand the overall software portfolio of Schneider internal and external third-party software and tools and the value they can bring.
* Understand how Schneider can best support the design and build processes of our partners with our software and configurators.
* Actively collect market feedback on software requirements and functionalities.


**Sales & Customer Support**
* Provide hands-on support for channel sales teams, helping them convey the message and bring added value to design offices, panel builders, contractors, and system integrators.
* Act as a subject-matter expert for software related topics.
* Offer pre-sales and post-sales software expertise to internal sales teams.


**Training & Enablement**
* Deliver training to internal and external stakeholders (software, tools/configurators, or process related).
* Prepare and present training materials to different audiences.
* Ensure successful adoption of software tools across markets.


**Required Skills & Experience**
* Ability and motivation to work in an international and Nordic-wide environment.
* Good understanding of design/planning/building processes and related software tools.
* Ability to form a clear overall picture of technical concepts and workflows.
* Strong communication and presentation skills.
* Experience collaborating with internal teams, customers, and external partners.
* Not required to be highly technical but must understand processes and tools well enough to guide others.
* Proficiency in English. Other Nordic languages are considered a bonus.


**Why Schneider Electric?** 
  

  

 At Schneider Electric, we are committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive work culture where every employee is empowered to thrive. As part of our team, you can expect:
   

  

* Professional Growth: Access to continuous learning opportunities, mentorship programs, and career development resources to nurture your potential and drive your career forward.
* Innovative Environment: Be part of a dynamic, forward-thinking organization that encourages creativity, innovation, and entrepreneurial spirit as we lead the way in digital transformation and sustainability.
* Work-Life Balance: We value your well-being and offer flexible work arrangements, comprehensive wellness programs, and support to help you maintain a healthy work-life balance.
* Global Impact: Contribute to meaningful projects that address global energy challenges and sustainability, making a positive impact on the world while advancing your career.
* Inclusive Community: Join a diverse and inclusive community where your unique perspectives are celebrated, and your voice is heard, fostering an environment of collaboration and belonging.


**Did we get you inspired?**
 Apply now to embark on an exciting career journey with us!
   

  

 Submit your application today as we will fill the position as soon as a suitable candidate is found.
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Localization Manager
description:
**We’ve signed up for an ambitious journey. Join us!**
*As Arrive, we guide customers and communities towards brighter futures and more livable cities, it isn’t a challenge just anyone could take on. Luckily, we have something to help us make it happen. Our people and our values. We Arrive Curious, Focused and Together. Just as our entire brand is inspired by the North Star, the shining light leading travelers to their destinations since time began, our values guide us. They help us be at our best. For our customers. For the cities and communities we serve. For ourselves. As a global team, we are transforming urban mobility. Let’s grow better, together.*
**The Role**
 We're looking for a Localization Manager to join our team and help ensure that all of our customers, regardless of their language,get the most out of our products. As an early member of the localization team, this role will be pivotal in both setting direction and executing at a tactical level to bring our suite of digital products to life across markets. The localization team is a part of our larger product design organization, consisting of 25+ members spanning roles in UX design, research, writing, and localization.
   

  

**How To Make An Impact**
* Own end-to-end localization processes for a collection of product experiences within the larger Arrive portfolio spanning 27+ languages (and growing)
* Lead localization design reviews of planned new features
* Select and optimize fit-for-purpose translation workflows
* Build and execute Localization Quality Assurance testing processes with internal and external resources
* Manage localization budget and vendors for assigned product experiences
* Be the advocate for our language-diverse customer base through regular evangelization with your cross functional colleagues throughout the business


**About You**
 You are a strategic operator who views localization as a product growth lever, not just a translation task. You thrive in ambiguity and are excited by the prospect of building localization processes & support models from the ground up to support your product verticals.
   

  

 While you excel at project management, you’re looking for a role that extends beyond file handoffs and vendor deadlines. You are a self-starter who wants to dig into the data, align localization with broader business metrics, and collaborate with Product and Engineering to build scalable, global-ready software.
   

  

**Your background**
* Proven experience managing end-to-end localization programs supporting web and mobile app interfaces (from design critique through LQA)
* Experience and passion for leveraging AI within localization processes
* Experience collaborating with Product Managers and Engineers to address localization within the Product Development Life Cycle (PDLC)
* 6+ years of experience working with Translation Management Systems (Smartling, Phrase, Lokalise, Weblate, etc.)
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to balance speed, quality, and cost tradeoffs to support business objectives
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
* Fluency in English and proficiency in at least one other language


 This role can be based in Stockholm, Amsterdam, or Łódź.
   

  

 Arrive, including brands like EasyPark, Flowbird, RingGo, ParkMobile and Parkopedia, is a leading global mobility platform.
